Melt together chocolate chips and shortening on top of a double boiler until smooth. Allow to cool slightly at room temperature.
Dip frozen eggs into melted chocolate mixture until completely coated. Place dipped eggs on wax paper-lined cookie sheets and return to the freezer to harden. Store eggs in the refrigerator.

easter-folar-teleculinaria.name: Easter Folar
instructions: Coloque a farinha sobre a bancada e abra uma cavidade no centro. Dissolva o fermento no leite morno e coloque na cavidade da farinha. Junte os ovos crus, a manteiga, o açúcar, as especiarias e uma pitada de sal e comece a misturar tudo, cuidadosamente. Amasse depois muito bem, até ficar tudo ligado.
Transfira a massa para uma tigela, cubra com um pano e deixe levedar, até dobrar de tamanho.
Nessa altura, coloque a massa novamente sobre a bancada, divida-a em duas partes iguais e forme duas bolas, achatando-as um pouco. Disponha um ovo cozido no centro de cada uma.

Forre um tabuleiro com papel vegetal e disponha nele os folares. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 170ºc, por cerca de 30 minutos. Alguns minutos antes de terminar a cozedura, pincele a superfície com ovo batido e deixe terminar. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

easter-goat-stew-kitchen-robot-teleculin.name: Easter Goat Stew (kitchen Robot)
easter-goat-stew-kitchen-robot-teleculin.original_name: Caldeirada de cabrito de Páscoa (robot de cozinha)
instructions: Descasque os dentes de alho, as cebolas e as batatas, lamine os dentes de alho e corte a cebola e as batatas em rodelas. Limpe os pimentos de sementes e corte-os em rodelas. Corte também os tomates em cubos. Corte a carne em pedaços, coloque numa taça e tempere com sal, pimenta e metade do vinho branco.
No copo do robot, coloque a cebola, os dentes de alho, um pouco de salsa e o azeite. Feche e programe 80ºC, durante 8 minutos, na velocidade mínima.
Adicione a carne com a marinada, a polpa de tomate, o restante vinho branco, piripíri, e um pouco de água, de modo a cobrir ligeiramente a carne. Retifique os temperos.

Encaixe por cima o recipiente para cozinhar a vapor, adicione as batatas, o tomate, os pimentos e alecrim, tempere com sal, feche e programe na temperatura vapor, durante 45 minutos, na velocidade mínima invertida. Sirva como acompanhamento da carne.

easter-gummies-a-fun-and-delicious-desse.name: Easter Gummies: A Fun And Delicious Dessert
easter-gummies-a-fun-and-delicious-desse.original_name: Gomas de pascua: un postre divertido y delicioso

ingredients.item: Aceite en aerosol o aceite vegetal

instructions: Con unas tijeras, haz un agujero pequeño en la parte superior de cada huevo de plástico. Engrasa con el aceite que elijas el interior para evitar que la gelatina se adhiera.
En recipientes separados, mezcla ¾ de taza de agua hirviendo con cada sabor de gelatina, removiendo hasta que se disuelvan completamente.

Coloca los huevos con el agujero hacia arriba en un cartón vacío. Con la jeringa de cocina, rellena cada huevo hasta 1/3 de su capacidad con un color y refrigera por 45 minutos para que cuaje. Repite este proceso con otros colores, esperando siempre 45 minutos entre cada capa. Finalmente, llena los huevos hasta el tope con la última capa de gelatina y refrigera por 1 hora más.
Una vez que la gelatina esté completamente cuajada, abre con cuidado los huevos de plástico para extraer los huevos de gelatina y disfruta.

easter-ham.name: Easter Ham
instructions: Score ham by making 1/2-inch-deep diagonal cuts in a diamond pattern.
Mix brown sugar with enough mustard to make a smooth, pourable sauce.
Place ham into a roasting pan. Drizzle honey, reserved pineapple juice, and brown sugar mixture over top.
Arrange pineapple rings decoratively on ham and secure with wooden toothpicks.
Bake in the preheated oven, basting every 15 minutes with pan juices, until the diamond pattern on ham splits open, about 1 to 1 ½ hours.
Serve and enjoy!

easter-ham-with-golden-breadcrumbs-and-m.name: Easter Ham With Golden Breadcrumbs And Madeira Sauce

ingredients.item: Coarse fresh breadcrumbs made from six 1/2-inch-thick slices rustic white bread

instructions: Arrange a rack on lowest level of oven; pre-heat to 300°. Without trimming fat, remove outer rind from most of ham, leaving a band around end of shank bone. Spacing cuts 3/4" apart to make a diamond pattern, score fat on top of ham crosswise and then lengthwise on a diagonal (do not cut into meat). Place ham in a large roasting pan. Pour 3 cups water into pan and roast ham for 2 hours.

Meanwhile, stir brown sugar and mustard in a medium bowl until a thick paste forms; set aside. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add breadcrumbs; toast, stirring often, until very crispy, 5–7 minutes. Set aside.

Remove ham from oven; increase temperature to 350°. Spread half of sugar-mustard paste over scored top of ham. Bake until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of ham registers 145°, about 1 hour. If pan juices have dried out, add 1 cup water to pan.
Remove ham from oven; increase temperature to 400°. Spread remaining sugar-mustard paste over ham and pack breadcrumbs all over top.
Bake ham until crumbs are deep golden brown and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Transfer ham to a serving platter; let rest for 20 minutes before carving.

Line a fine-mesh sieve with cheesecloth. Set sieve over a medium pitcher or gravy boat. Spoon off fat from surface of juices in pan; discard. Add Madeira to pan. Place roasting pan over medium-high heat and simmer liquids briskly, scraping up browned bits, until sauce thickens and is reduced to 2 cups, about 15 minutes. Strain sauce through prepared sieve, pressing on solids; discard solids.
Carve ham. Serve sauce alongside.

easter-lamb-teleculinaria.name: Easter Lamb
instructions: Coloque o cordeiro num tabuleiro e tempere com a cebola e os dentes de alho, picados, as folhas de louro, a salsa picada, as folhas de alecrim, o pimentão-doce, o vinho branco, o caldo de carne desfeito, sal e pimenta. Envolva bem e deixe marinar durante 2 horas.
Após o tempo indicado, adicione ao cordeiro a água, o azeite e a manteiga. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 20 minutos.

Descasque as chalotas e as batatas, lave-as e corte as chalotas ao meio. Junte ao tabuleiro, após o tempo anteriormente indicado, envolva e leve ao forno até que tudo fique bem assado. Retire e sirva quente, decorado com um raminho de tomilho.

easter-lamb-cupcakes.name: Easter Lamb Cupcakes
instructions: Frost each cupcake with an even layer of frosting using a spatula or a palette knife.
Use a skewer to poke 2 holes in the top end of each marshmallow half for the ears. Poke 2 holes at the bottom of the front side for each of the nostrils.

Cut the black licorice laces into short lengths: 24 small pieces for the nostrils and thirty-six 1/3-inch lengths for the ears and tails. Stick the shorter licorice pieces into the marshmallows where you've poked holes for the nostrils. Stick 24 of the longer pieces into the marshmallows where you've poked holes for the ears. Attach 1 marshmallow head to each cupcake.

Cover the cupcakes with mini marshmallows, sticking them to the frosting flat-side down. Leave space on the opposite side of the head to attach the tail. Poke a hole there using a skewer, then stick in the remaining licorice pieces for the tails.
Spread the backs of two candy eyeballs with a bit of frosting. Attach to the marshmallow, positioning above the nose. Repeat with remaining eyeballs.

easter-lemon-bread.name: Easter Lemon Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour 2 loaf pans.
Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt and set aside.

Beat the butter and 2 1/2 cups sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until light and fluffy. The mixture should be noticeably lighter in color. Add the room-temperature eggs one at a time, allowing each egg to blend into the butter mixture before adding the next. Beat in the almond extract with the last egg.

Pour in the flour mixture alternately with the milk, mixing until just incorporated. Fold in the lemon zest and chopped walnuts, mixing just enough to evenly combine. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until the loaves are very lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the middle comes out clean, 60 to 70 minutes.

Mix the lemon juice with the 1/2 cup sugar in a bowl until the sugar has dissolved. Pour the lemon glaze over the hot cakes; allow to stand for 10 minutes before removing cakes from the pans. Cool before serving.

easter-lemon-drop-mousse.name: Easter Lemon Drop Mousse
instructions: To prepare the crust, combine the crushed vanilla wafers with the melted butter and 1/4 cup of the finely crushed candy (save the remainder for use as a decoration). Mix well, then press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Refrigerate while proceeding with the recipe.

Whisk together egg yolks, lemon juice, lemon zest, and 2 tablespoons of sugar until smooth, then set aside. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Sprinkle in the cream of tartar and continue whipping until soft peaks form. Gradually add 3/4 cups of sugar while continuing to whip to stiff peaks.
Fold the egg yolk mixture into the egg whites, then gently fold in the whipped cream until no streaks remain. Spoon this mixture into the chilled crust, and place into the freezer.

Whip the remaining 1/2 cup of whipping cream until it starts to thicken, then gradually add 3 tablespoons of light corn syrup, and continue beating until stiff. Using a pastry bag, pipe the whipped cream onto the mousse in a decorative pattern. Sprinkle the top with the reserved crushed lemon drop candy. Freeze for at least 8 hours before serving.

easter-meat-frame-argiro.name: Easter Meat Frame
instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε πρώτα το φούρνο μας στους 170°C, στις αντιστάσεις.
Κόβουμε τα κρεατικά σε κομμάτια.
Τα βάζουμε σε μια λεκάνη.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και πασπαλίζουμε με τη ρίγανη.
Προσθέτουμε τα σκόρδα, τα κρεμμύδια και τη μουστάρδα και περιχύνουμε με το ελαιόλαδο.
Τα ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά.
Απλώνουμε 2 μεγάλες λαδόκολλες στον πάγκο μας, τοποθετώντας τες σταυρωτά.
Αδειάζουμε όλα τα υλικά, σχηματίζοντας λόφο.
Τυλίγουμε τις λαδόκολλες, κλείνοντάς τες σταυρωτά σε πακέτο, ώστε να φυλακίσουμε το κρέας και τα υγρά που θα βγάλει στο ψήσιμο.
Δένουμε το πακέτο καλά με σπάγκο ψησίματος.
Το βάζουμε σε ταψί.
Σε αυτό το στάδιο μπορούμε να φυλάξουμε το καρέ στο ψυγείο για μερικές ώρες έως μία νύχτα.
Θα το αφήσουμε στον πάγκο της κουζίνας περίπου 40 λεπτά να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου για να το ψήσουμε.
Ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 170°C για 4 ώρες.

easter-mona-traditional-recipe-pequerece.name: Easter Mona (traditional Recipe)

ingredients.item: 20 g de levadura fresca (o 7 g de levadura seca de panadero)
80 ml de aceite de oliva suave
Opcional: 1 chorrito de agua de azahar
1 yema de huevo y 1 cucharada de leche para pintar
Huevos (cantidad según las monas que hagamos)
50 g de azúcar humedecido con unas gotas de agua

instructions: Ponemos 50 de harina de fuerza en un bol, hacemos un hueco en el centro y vertemos 50 ml de leche templada en el hueco. Añadimos la levadura fresca desmenuzada en la leche y lo mezclamos todo bien con un tenedor hasta que nos quede una especie de papilla. Tapamos con un paño húmedo y lo dejamos reposar unos 20 o 30 minutos, hasta que el prefermento empiece a burbujear.

Mientras reposa el prefermento, ponemos a calentar 100 ml de leche añadiéndole una rama de canela y la piel de media naranja previamente lavada. Antes de que empiece a cocer, la retiramos del fuego y la dejamos enfriar hasta que esté templada.

En un bol grande mezclamos el resto de ingredientes: 450 g de harina de fuerza, 120 g de azúcar, 2 huevos, 80 ml de aceite de oliva suave, un chorrito de agua de azahar y una pizca de sal. Colamos la leche aromatizada ya templada y la añadimos a la masa mezclándolo todo bien. Finalmente añadimos el prefermento que hemos dejado reposar y volvemos a mezclar todo En una superficie ligeramente enharinada vertemos la masa y amasamos durante unos 10 o 15 minutos hasta que la masa nos quede elástica y brillante. Al principio es normal que la masa sea muy pegajosa, si se nos pega mucho podemos echar un poco de aceite o harina en las manos para poder trabajarla mejor. Alternativamente, si tenéis una amasadora o robot de cocina podéis amasar con ellos durante unos 5-10 minutos.
Una vez hemos terminado de amasar, formamos una bola y la colocamos en un bol tapada con un paño húmedo y la dejamos levar durante aproximadamente hora y media, hasta que haya doblado su tamaño.

Una vez la masa ha levado lo suficiente, dividimos la masa en trozos según la cantidad y el tamaño de las monas que queráis hacer. Con estas cantidades, nosotros hemos hecho cuatro trozos de igual tamaño, para hacer monas individuales, pero también podéis dividirla en dos para hacer monas de tamaño mediano.
De cada uno de los trozos de masa formamos bolas amasándolas brevemente, aplastándolas ligeramente.
En cada una de las bolas de masa, hacemos un agujero en el centro con los dedos y colócamos un huevo en el agujero, para darle la forma típica de las Monas de Pascua valencianas.

En un bol pequeño mezclamos un huevo batido con una cucharada de leche y pintamos las monas con un pincel. Forramos la bandeja del horno con papel de hornear y colocamos cuidadosamente las monas de Pascua dejando algo de espacio entre ellas Dejamos levar una segunda vez en un lugar cálido durante unos 45-60 minutos. Mientras tanto precalentamos el horno a 180° con calor arriba y abajo Una vez han crecido en tamaño volvemos a pintar las monas con la mezcla de huevo y leche, con mucho cuidado y sin apretar para no desinflar la masa. Echamos unas gotas de agua a 50 g de azúcar para humedecerlo y lo repartimos por la superficie de la masa a nuestro gusto.

Finalmente horneamos durante unos 15-20 minutos si son monas individuales o 20-25 si son monas medianas Si vemos que se están dorando demasiado por arriba, podemos taparlas a mitad de tiempo con algo de papel de aluminio. Cuando estén listas, las sacamos del horno y las dejamos enfriar en una rejilla. Si queremos podemos quitar los huevos con los que las hemos horneado y cambiarlos por huevos pintados de colores, y ya tenemos listas nuestras Monas de Pascua para la merienda.

easter-nest-cake-teleculinaria.name: Easter Nest Cake

ingredients.item: 150 g de fios de ovos de compra

instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com o leite e o açúcar baunilhado e deixe amornar. Numa tigela, bata as gemas com o açúcar até ficar um mistura clara, junte a farinha maisena e depois o leite, em fio e mexendo sempre. Deite esta mistura para o tacho e leve ao lume, mexendo sempre até ferver e obter um creme liso. Deite depois para uma tigela, cubra com película aderente e deixe arrefecer.

Ligue o forno a 180ºC, barre uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Misture o açúcar com a farinha. Numa tigela grande, bata as claras em castelo bem firme, adicione a mistura do açúcar e mexa muito bem. Adicione depois as gemas, a fécula previamente misturada com o fermento e a raspa do limão e misture bem.

Verta o preparado anterior na forma, leve ao forno durante 40 minutos, verifique a cozedura com um palito, retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco, desenforme e deixe arrefecer totalmente. Corte o bolo ao meio de modo a obter duas rodelas, barre a parte inferior com um pouco do creme do recheio, reponha a rodela superior e barre todo o bolo com o resto do creme. Cubra depois com os fios de ovos e sirva decorado com amêndoas ou outra decoração a gosto.

easter-nest-for-kitchen-robot-teleculina.name: Easter Nest For Kitchen Robot
easter-nest-for-kitchen-robot-teleculina.original_name: Ninho da Páscoa para Robot de Cozinha
instructions: Faça o creme: Deite o açúcar para o copo do robot, junte a farinha, a água, as gemas e os ovos e ligue 5 segundos na velocidade 5. Encaixe depois o acessório misturador e programe a 90ºC, durante 4 minutos, na velocidade 4. Retire de imediato para uma tigela e deixe arrefecer.

Ligue o forno a 180 graus. Unte uma forma de buraco com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Lave o copo, limpe-o, deite-lhe os ovos, o açúcar e a margarina e ligue 30 segundos na velocidade 6. Junte depois a farinha misturada com o fermento, ligue mais 30 segundos na velocidade 6, deite na forma e leve ao forno durante cerca de 40 minutos. Espete um palito para verificar a cozedura, retire do forno desenforme e deixe arrefecer.

Corte depois o bolo ao meio de modo a obter duas rodelas, barre a parte inferior com 1/3 do creme, reponha a parte de cima e barre todo o bolo com o restante creme. Espalhe os fios de ovos por cima e dentro do buraco, decore com amêndoas variadas e sirva.

easter-nest-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Easter Nest Recipe
instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Numa tigela, bata o açúcar com a manteiga até que fique um creme. Junte as gemas, bata mais um pouco, depois adicione a amêndoa moída, o fermento e a farinha e bata novamente muito bem. À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as no preparado. Verta a na forma e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante 45 minutos ou até que fique cozido. Retire do forno e desenforme.

Faça a cobertura: parta o chocolate em pedaços e pique-os numa trituradora. Numa tigela, junte a manteiga, o açúcar em pó, o ovo e o chocolate triturado e bata tudo muito bem até que fique um creme bastante homogéneo.

Corte o bolo ao meio de modo a obter duas rodelas, barre a metade inferior com 1/3 do creme, reponha a metade superior e barre todo o bolo com o restante creme. Espalhe por cima os fios de ovos e sirva decorado com amêndoas de Páscoa a gosto.

easter-rice-pie.name: Easter Rice Pie
instructions: Grease two 9-inch pie plates and set aside.

Make pastry: Pulse flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a food processor several times until combined. Add cold butter and pulse until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg and vanilla; process until dough holds together, about 30 seconds.
Transfer dough to a well-floured work surface, divide in half, and roll each piece into a 9-inch round crust. Fit crusts into the prepared pie plates and freeze for 1 hour.
Make filling: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan; stir in rice and return to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook until rice has absorbed water, about 20 minutes.
Stir milk into rice and bring to a simmer; cook until thickened, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Beat together ricotta cheese, eggs, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest in a large bowl until smooth. Stir in cooled rice mixture and crushed pineapple until thoroughly combined.
Divide filling between frozen pie crusts.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set and the tops are golden brown, about 1 hour 30 minutes. Cool on wire racks.

easter-salad.name: Easter Salad

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: watermelon, red, and/or breakfast), trimmed, thinly sliced and/or cut into wedges

instructions: Cook 6 large eggs in a medium pot of boiling water for 7 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water until cool enough to handle. Peel, then cut or tear into bite-size pieces. Set eggs aside.

Whisk 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 3 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 3 Tbsp. white wine vinegar, 1 Tbsp. honey, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl or measuring glass to combine; season with freshly ground pepper. Gradually drizzle in ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, whisking constantly until emulsified.

Place 1 lb. mixed radishes (such as purple daikon, watermelon, red, and/or breakfast), trimmed, thinly sliced and/or cut into wedges, ⅓ cup green olives, pitted, torn, ¼ cup torn dill, and reserved eggs in a large bowl. Drizzle vinaigrette over as desired (you may not need it all) and toss salad to combine.

easter-simnel-cake.name: Easter Simnel Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Grease and flour a deep 8-inch springform pan. Line the bottom and sides of the pan with greased parchment paper.

Beat butter and brown sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in 4 eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in flour. Stir in golden raisins, currants, candied cherries, mixed fruit, lemon zest, and mixed spice until incorporated. Pour 1/2 of the batter into the prepared pan.
Divide almond paste into 3 equal portions. Roll out 1 portion into an 8-inch circle. Place over batter in the pan. Cover with remaining cake batter.

Bake in the preheated oven until evenly brown and firm to the touch, 2 hours 30 minutes. If cake is browning too quickly, cover with aluminum foil after 1 hour of baking. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn cake out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Set the oven's broiler to high.
Place apricot jam in a small microwave-safe bowl and heat in the microwave until warm, about 5 seconds. Brush the top of cooled cake with warm jam.

Roll out another portion of almond paste into an 8-inch circle and place on top of cake. Brush the top with beaten egg. Divide remaining portion of almond paste into 11 pieces, roll into balls, and arrange around the outside edge of the top of cake. Brush the tops of balls lightly with beaten egg.
Place cake under the preheated broiler until almond paste is golden brown, 8 to 10 minutes.

easter-soup-teleculinaria.name: Easter Soup
instructions: Lave a galinha, deite-a para uma panela, junte bastante água, tempere com um pouco de sal, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar até a galinha ficar macia, acrescentando mais água sempre que necessário. Depois retire a galinha.
Passe o caldo da cozedura pelo coador de rede fina, deite novamente 2 L para a panela, leve ao lume, adicione o caldo e a cebola descascada e picada muito finamente e deixe ferver.

Junte depois a cenoura descascada e ralada, deixe ferver, junte de seguida a aletria partida e deixe cozer durante 8 minutos. Rectifique o sal, retire do lume e sirva a sopa quente com os ovos da galinha e a hortelã.

easter-sponge-cake-teleculinaria.name: Easter Sponge Cake

ingredients.item: 2 colheres colheres sopa de farinha maizena
Raspa de limão ou essência de baunilha facultativo

instructions: Bata as claras em castelo bem firmes adicionando o açúcar aos poucos  Junte depois as gemas e bata mais um pouco  Adicione a farinha e o fermento, envolva suavemente  Unte uma forma com margarina, verta o preparado anterior e leve ao forno pré aquecido a 180 graus durante 25 minutos  Decorrido esse tempo, retire do forno, desenforme e deixe arrefecer.

Ferva o leite com a raspa de limão ou a raspa de limão  Numa tigela junte o açúcar com a farinha, mexa  Junte os ovos e bata bem  Adicione o leite em fio, mexendo sempre suavemente  Verta para o tacho e leve ao lume, mexendo sempre até engrossar  Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer
Corte o bolo ao meio, barre com 1/3/ do creme, disponha por cima o bolo e barre com o restante creme  Polvilhe com a amêndoa laminada e as améndoas de chocolate  Decore a gosto e sirva

easter-turkey-leg-teleculinaria.name: Easter Turkey Leg
instructions: Prepare a marinada: coloque todos os ingredientes indicados num liquidificador, à exceção do vinho branco, e triture até obter uma pasta.

Descasque as cebolas, corte-as em rodelas e disponha-as no fundo de um tabuleiro. Coloque a perna de peru por cima, barre-a com a marinada anterior, regue-a com o vinho branco, tape com papel de alumínio e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 160ºc, durante 1 hora e 30 minutos.

Após o tempo indicado, retire o tabuleiro do forno, junte as batatas, previamente descascadas e cortadas em cubos, e as cebolas roxas, cortadas em meias-luas grossas. Leve novamente ao forno, pré-aquecido a 170ºc, sem o papel de alumínio, durante cerca de 45 minutos. Quando estiver tudo bem douradinho, retire do forno e sirva.

easter-veal-teleculinaria.name: Easter Veal
instructions: Corte a costela de vitela em pedaços grandes e deite-os para uma tigela. Tempere com sal, pimenta, os alhos picados, as folhas de louro, o colorau, o vinho branco, o vinagre e o azeite, misture bem e deixe marinar no frio de um dia para o outro.

No dia, deite a vitela para um tabuleiro, junte a marinada e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante 1 hora e 45 minutos, virando e regando de vez em quando. Descasque as batatinhas, lave-as, junte-as à vitela logo que comece a ficar douradinha, envolva-as bem no molho e deixe assar até as batatas ficarem também douradinhas.

Entretanto, lave os cogumelos e corte-os ao meio ou em quartos. Corte o bacon em pedacinhos, deite-os para uma frigideira, leve ao lume sem juntar gordura e deixe cozinhar até ficarem douradinhos. Retire e reserve o bacon, adicione os cogumelos à mesma frigideira com a gordura que o bacon libertou e deixe-os cozinhar até ficarem douradinhos e sem líquido. Junte novamente o bacon, misture, rectifiquei o sal, tempere com uma pitada e pimenta e sirva a acompanhar a vitela com as batatinhas. Polvilhe tudo com salsa picada.

easter-veal-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Easter Veal Recipe
instructions: Corte a costela de vitela em pedaços grandes e deite-os para uma tigela. Tempere com sal, pimenta, os alhos picados, as folhas de louro, o colorau, o vinho branco, o vinagre e o azeite, misture bem e deixe marinar no frio de um dia para o outro.

No dia, deite a vitela para um tabuleiro, junte a marinada e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 180ºC durante 1 hora e 45 minutos, virando e regando de vez em quando. Descasque as batatinhas, lave-as, junte-as à vitela logo que comece a ficar douradinha, envolva-as bem no molho e deixe assar até as batatas ficarem também douradinhas.

Entretanto, lave os cogumelos e corte-os ao meio ou em quartos. Corte o bacon em pedacinhos, deite-os para uma frigideira, leve ao lume sem juntar gordura e deixe cozinhar até ficarem douradinhos. Retire e reserve o bacon, adicione os cogumelos à mesma frigideira com a gordura que o bacon libertou e deixe-os cozinhar até ficarem douradinhos e sem líquido. Junte novamente o bacon, misture, retifique o sal, tempere com uma pitada e pimenta e sirva a acompanhar a vitela com as batatinhas. Polvilhe tudo com salsa picada.

eastern-carolinastyle-biscuits.name: Eastern Carolina–style Biscuits
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Create a large well in the center and add buttermilk and ½ cup lard. Gradually work in dry ingredients with your hands until a soft dough forms. It should hold together but be scoopable.

Using a ¼-cup measuring cup, scoop dough onto a small baking sheet lightly greased with lard to make 12 portions; they should be touching. Bake biscuits on bottom rack 20 minutes, then transfer to top and bake until golden brown, 7–10 minutes longer.

eastern-european-kotlety.name: Eastern European Kotlety
instructions: Mix ground beef, cracker crumbs, onion, egg, milk, garlic, kosher salt, and black pepper in a large bowl until evenly blended. Shape meat mixture into twelve 3-inch patties about 1 1/4-inch thick.

Heat vegetable shortening in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear patties until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking, uncovered, until patties are no longer pink in the center, about 20 minutes more. Remove patties from skillet and drain on paper towels until ready to serve.

eat-differently-with-this-spinach-bread-.name: Eat Differently With This Spinach Bread
eat-differently-with-this-spinach-bread-.original_name: Come diferente con este pan de espinacas
instructions: Vamos a tomar nuestras espinacas y la blanquearemos, es decir, la cortaremos en trozos moderados, la pasaremos por agua hirviendo por 1 minuto y posteriormente la metemos en agua fría para cortar la cocción. Una vez hecho este paso, reservamos.
Toma un poco del agua y agrégale la levadura para activarla, la revuelves y reservas.
Vamos a tamizar la harina, pásala por un colador para verificar que no tenga grupos. Colócala en un recipiente amplio, le agregaremos la sal , el azúcar e integramos.

Abrimos un espacio en nuestra harina como si fuese un volcán, añadiremos la mantequilla derretida, la levadura activada, las espinacas y el resto del agua. Con tus manos vamos a incorporar todos los ingredientes hasta obtener una textura homogénea.

Enharina tu encimera para terminar el proceso de amasado. Coloca la mezcla y estirarás muy bien durante 7 minutos para darle suavidad a la masa. Harás de ella una bola, la meterás en un bol, la tapas con un pañito y dejarás reposar por 1 hora.

Toma nuevamente tu masa, la estirarás otra vez por cinco minutos y le daremos forma al pan de espinacas. A mi me gusta hacerlo en molde para luego rebanarlo. Estiras muy bien, lo enrollas, engrasas el molde y lo introduces en el. Dejaremos doblar su tamaño por 30 hora.
Faltando pocos minutos para que culmine ese proceso, precalienta el horno a 180° grados centígrados.
Hornearás tu pan por aproximadamente por 45 minutos hasta que tome un doradito avellanado y esté suavecito por dentro.
Deja enfriar y rebánalo, estará listo para comer.

eat-michigan-salad.name: Eat Michigan Salad
instructions: In the container of a blender, combine mayonnaise, maple syrup, vinegar, and sugar. Cover and blend on low speed. Gradually pour in vegetable oil while mixing until fully incorporated. Taste and season accordingly with salt and pepper. Set aside.
In a large serving bowl, combine lettuce, cherries, apples, goat cheese and candied pecans. Toss with just enough dressing to coat, then serve with remaining dressing on the side.

eat-them-right-out-of-the-pot-vegetarian.name: eat Them Right Out Of The Pot' Vegetarian Collard Greens

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a large stockpot halfway with water; add vinegar, seafood seasoning, and olive oil. Bring liquid to a boil.
Mix collard greens, jalapeno peppers, and garlic into boiling water; return to a boil. Cover stockpot, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until greens are very tender, 3 to 4 hours.
Drain water from greens and mash garlic cloves; season with salt and pepper.

eatons-pulled-pork.name: Eaton's Pulled Pork

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Arrange onion slices in the bottom of a slow cooker. Season pork with salt and pepper and place over onion. Add vinegar and water.

Cook pork on Low for 8 hours. Transfer pork to a platter and shred with two forks. Remove and discard about half the pork juices from slow cooker and stir in shredded pork, barbeque sauce, and brown sugar.

ebi-no-chiri-sosu-japanese-shrimp-in-chi.name: Ebi No Chiri-sōsu (japanese Shrimp In Chile Sauce)

ingredients.item: (3/4 ounce; 20g) plus 1 teaspoon unmodified potato starch

ingredients.prep: plus more if needed; for table salt, use half as much by volume
such as Chinese doubanjiang or Japanese tobanjan (see note)

ingredients.item: Homemade or store-bought chicken stock or water
Negi (welsh onion) or 1/2 small leek (2 ounces; 55g)
ingredients.prep: white part only, rinsed well and minced (see note)

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together 1 teaspoon potato starch with 1/4 cup (60ml) cold water until well combined; set aside.

Rinse the shrimp under cold running water, massaging the shrimp with your hands, for 1 minute. In a medium bowl, combine the rinsed shrimp, baking soda, egg white, and salt. Add remaining 2 tablespoons potato starch and, using a spoon or clean hands, toss to coat shrimp.

Place a wire rack over a rimmed baking sheet. In a carbon-steel wok or 10-inch carbon steel or stainless-steel skillet, heat oil over high heat to 166°C (165°C). Add shrimp, discarding any excess marinade and dropping from as close to the oil’s surface as possible to minimize splashing, and fry, stirring and turning occasionally, until cooked through, about 2 minutes. (Potato starch will not brown significantly like wheat flour would, so the cooked shrimp will still appear quite pale.) Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer shrimp to prepared baking sheet. Carefully ladle oil through a fine-mesh strainer set over a medium heatproof bowl.

Return 2 tablespoons (30ml) oil to now-empty wok and return the wok to high heat (allow remaining oil to fully cool before storing). Add ginger and garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until softened but not browned, about 10 seconds. Add chile-bean paste and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in chicken stock, ketchup, sugar, vinegar, sake, and negi (or leek). Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook, stirring, until negi (leek) is softened and tender, about 2 minutes. Adjust seasoning to taste with sugar, vinegar, or salt as required.

Add reserved shrimp and toss to coat. Stir in potato starch slurry, a teaspoon or two at a time, until sauce thickens enough to coat the shrimp in a glaze; discard any remaining potato starch-water mixture or reserve for another use. If sauce over-thickens and becomes gloppy, loosen by stirring in water 1 tablespoon at a time.
Transfer to a plate and serve immediately.

echaude-de-carmaux-lezzet.name: Echaude De Carmaux
instructions: 1. Un, kabartma tozu, anason, şeker ve tuz harmanlanır.
2.  Sıvılar bir kapta karıştırılır ve kuru karışımların içine eklenir.
3.  Hamur yoğurulur.
4.  Hamur 0,5 cm kalınlıpında açılır ve yuvarlaklar kesilir.
5.  Üçgen olacak şekilde zarf gibi hamurlar katlanır.
6.  Su kaynatılır ve kaynar suda hamurlar su yüzeyine çıkana kadar haşlanır.
7.  Fazla suları süzülerek fırın tepsisine dizilir.
8.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürülür.
9.  190 derecede 30 dakika pişirilir.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

eclair-pan-argiro.name: Eclair Pan

ingredients.item: 500 grφυτική κρέμα γάλακτος ψυγείου (είναι γλυκιά) ή κρέμα γάλακτος 35% λιπαρά
500 grφυτική κρέμα γάλακτος ψυγείου (είναι γλυκιά) ή κρέμα γάλακτος 35% λιπαρά

instructions: Χτυπάμε σε ένα μπολ τη φυτική κρέμα ψυγείου (χωρίς να προσθέσουμε ζάχαρη, είναι ήδη γλυκιά) σε σφιχτή σαντιγί.
Την αφήνουμε στο ψυγείο.

eclairs-teleculinaria.name: Eclairs

ingredients.item: Para cobrir  chocolate branco e negro derretidos

instructions: Prepare o creme: misture as gemas com a farinha maisena e a chávena (chá) de açúcar. Leve a água com os 200 g de açúcar ao lume, até obter ponto de pérola fraco.
Adicione a calda à mistura das gemas, em fio e mexendo sempre, deite novamente no tacho e leve ao lume até engrossar, sem parar de mexer. Retire e deixe arrefecer.
Adicione a calda à mistura das gemas, em fio e mexendo sempre, deite novamente no tacho e leve ao lume até engrossar, sem parar de mexer. Retire e deixe arrefecer.

Deite a massa numa tigela e adicione-lhe os ovos, um a um, batendo sempre. Coloque num saco de pasteleiro com boquilha frisada ou lisa e, sobre um tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal, forme pequenas tiras. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, por cerca de 20 minutos ou até ficarem douradinhos, depois retire e deixe arrefecer.
Com a ajuda de uma faca, faça um furo numa das extremidades de cada éclair e recheie-os com o creme. Mergulhe o topo em chocolate branco e negro derretidos, deixe secar e sirva.

economical-seafood-rice-teleculinaria.name: Economical Seafood Rice
instructions: Descasque, lave e lamine os dentes de alho. Arranje os pimentos, rejeite pevides e peles brancas e corte em cubos. Arranje o tomate e corte também em cubos.

Numa panela com água abundante ferva o creme de marisco. Num tacho leve ao lume o azeite com os dentes de alho e a folha de louro e deixe alourar. Junte os pimentos e o tomate e deixe refogar um pouco. Refresque com o vinho branco.
Adicione a polpa de tomate, o picante e o creme de marisco e o arroz, no dobro da quantidade, ou seja, o recipiente que usar para medir o arroz, deverá encher 2 vezes para medir o creme de marisco.
Deixe levantar fervura, junte o cocktail de marisco e rectifique o sal e vá mexendo durante cerca de 7 minutos ou até o arroz estar cozido. Retire e sirva decorado a gosto.

ecuadorian-burst-shrimp-recipe-comedera.name: Ecuadorian Burst Shrimp Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ kg de camarones lavados (pelados y desvenados)

instructions: Vamos a poner los camarones en un recipiente hondo, luego agregamos la mostaza, los huevos, el ajo en polvo, la pimienta, la cebolla en polvo, sal al gusto.
Refrigeramos por media hora.
Mezclamos la harina con la maicena y la vaciamos en una bolsa plástica.
Sacamos los camarones de la nevera y los ponemos dentro de la bolsa donde está la harina. Agitamos bien, con el objetivo de empaparlos muy bien con la harina.
Ponemos en una sartén con aceite suficiente a fuego medio.
Cuando ya esté caliente vamos a freír los camarones por 5 minutos, los sacamos y los ponemos sobre papel absorbente.
Servimos aun tibios con el contorno de tu preferencia.

ecuadorian-encebollado-traditional-fish-.name: Ecuadorian Encebollado (traditional Fish Soup Recipe From Ecuador)
ecuadorian-encebollado-traditional-fish-.original_name: Encebollado ecuatoriano (receta de sopa de pescado tradicional de Ecuador)

ingredients.item: 500 g de pescado fresco (preferiblemente cazón, atún o mero)
2 cebollas rojas medianas, cortadas en juliana
2 pimientos verdes, picados en rodajas finas
2 cucharadas de aceite de achiote (opcional, para dar color)
4 tazas de caldo de pescado o agua
Maíz tostado o chifles (opcional, para acompañar)

instructions: En una olla grande, calienta el aceite de achiote (si lo estás usando) a fuego medio. Si no tienes aceite de achiote puedes utilizar aceite de oliva o aceite de girasol. En ese caso calienta el aceite vegetal a fuego medio. Opcionalmente, agrega una pizca de cúrcuma en polvo al aceite caliente. La cúrcuma le dará un tono amarillo al sofrito, similar al color que aporta el aceite de achiote. Luego, agrega las cebollas y los pimientos verdes. Sofríe hasta que las cebollas estén doradas y los pimientos estén tiernos.
Añade los tomates picados y cocina por unos minutos hasta que se ablanden.
Agrega el caldo de pescado o agua a la olla y lleva la mezcla a ebullición. Reduce el fuego y deja cocinar a fuego lento durante unos 15 minutos.
Agrega el pescado cortado en trozos a la olla y cocina hasta que esté tierno y bien cocido.
Añade la salsa de tomate y mezcla bien. Añade sal y pimienta al gusto.

Justo antes de servir, incorpora el cilantro fresco y el zumo de limón. Esto le dará un toque de frescura al plato. Sirve caliente en platos hondos y, si lo deseas, acompaña con yuca cocida, maíz tostado o chifles.

ecuadorian-llapingachos-recipes-step-by-.name: Ecuadorian Llapingachos Recipes, Step By Step
ecuadorian-llapingachos-recipes-step-by-.original_name: Recetas de Llapingachos ecuatorianos, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 5-6  5-6 papas grandes  (peladas y cortadas en trozos medianos)
½ taza cebolla blanca ( picada finamente)
1 taza  queso o quesillo desmenuzado ( puede usar mozzarella o oaxaca)

instructions: Lava y pela las papas y ponlas en una olla profunda cubiertas por agua y una cucharadita de sal, deja que hierva hasta que estén suaves.
Calienta el aceite a temperatura media y prepara un refrito con la cebolla y el achiote,  hasta que las cebollas estén suaves, aproximadamente unos cinco minutos.
Haz un puré con las papas y agrega el refrito de cebolla y sal y mezcla bien.
Cubre la mezcla de papas y deja reposar a temperatura ambiente por lo menos durante una hora.
Forma bolas pequeñas con la mezcla de papas, haz un hueco en la mitad de cada bola y rellénalo con el queso.
Aplasta las bolas hasta que tengan forma de tortillas gruesas y déjalas reposar en la refrigeradora durante 30 minutos o hasta que la hora de cocinarlas.
Cocina las tortillas en una parrilla plana o una sartén caliente hasta que estén doradas por ambos lados.
Sirve los llapingachos con huevo frito, salsa de mani, chorizo, curtido de tomate y cebolla, tajas de aguacate y ají.

ecuadorian-oven-recipe-comedera.name: Ecuadorian Oven Recipe

ingredients.item: 3½ kilo de carne de cerdo  (espaldilla, paletilla, lomo de cabeza o lomo)
½ cda.  de pimienta negra molida
170  grs.  de mantequilla o manteca de cerdo

instructions: Pon la carne de cerdo en una fuente grande para marinar.
Mezcla en una licuadora o un procesador de alimento, el jugo del limón y los aliños
Con un cuchillo o trincho haz varias punzadas en la superficie del cerdo para que el aliño penetre hasta su interior.
Vierte las 3 tazas de cerveza encima de la carne y deja reposar durante la noche en la refrigeradora.
Voltea la carne cada 4 horas para asegurar que ambas caras estén bien sazonadas.
Precalienta el horno a 400ºF (200ºC) y hornea el cerdo en una bandeja en la que quepa el líquido de la marinada.
Ubícalo con la piel o el cuero hacia arriba.
Hornea durante 30 minutos.
Mientras que en una olla pequeña, derrite 4 onzas de mantequilla o manteca a fuego lento, y agrega 1 cucharada de achiote molido y mezcla bien.
Baja la temperatura del horno a 177°C y vierte la mezcla de mantequilla y achiote derretida sobre la carne de cerdo.
Baña la carne con el adobo líquido aproximadamente cada 20-30 minutos.
Continúa asando a 350ºF y bañando la carne con el líquido durante aproximadamente 1 ½ horas.
Luego baja la temperatura del horno a 325ºF.
Cuando el líquido de la bandeja se empiece a reducir derrite la mantequilla o manteca restante a fuego lento.
Agrega las 2 tazas de cerveza y la cucharada restante de achiote molido, caliéntela pero no dejes que hierva.
Cocina durante 1 ½ hora más, bañando frecuentemente la carne.

eds-beer-can-chicken-rub.name: Ed's Beer Can Chicken Rub
instructions: Mix together brown sugar, dry mustard, granulated onion, paprika, kosher salt, garlic powder, coriander, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne pepper in a medium bowl until well combined. Store in an airtight container if not using right away.

edamame-and-corn-salad.name: Edamame And Corn Salad
instructions: Mix together tomatoes, edamame, corn, green onions, lime juice, olive oil, cilantro, and garlic in a serving bowl. Season with sea salt.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.

edamame-guacamole.name: Edamame Guacamole
instructions: BRING a medium pot of water to a boil. Prepare an ice bath and set aside.
COOK the edamame beans at a rolling boil until tender, 10 to 11 minutes. Drain the beans into a strainer and shock in the ice bath. Drain well.
PUREE the avocado, lime juice, garlic, and jalapeño in a food processor at high speed. Add the edamame beans and the process on high speed.
MEANWHILE, cook the broccoli at a rolling boil until tender, 7 to 8 minutes. Drain the broccoli and shock in the ice bath. Drain well and pat dry.
ADD the broccoli to the edamame mixture and process on high speed until very smooth, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed to incorporate all the ingredients.
TRANSFER the mixture to a medium bowl and fold in the remaining ingredients, mixing with a rubber spatula until well incorporated.

TRANSFER the guacamole to an airtight container and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour, before serving with accompaniment of choice. (The guacamole will keep in the refrigerator for up to two days.)

edamame-hummus.name: Edamame Hummus

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil plus more for drizzling
Chopped fresh cilantro plus more for garnish
Chopped fresh mint plus more for garnish

instructions: Cook edamame in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender, 3–5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a large bowl of ice water. Return water in pot to a boil and add peas; cook until heated through, about 1 minute. Transfer peas to bowl with edamame; let cool. Drain well.

Working in batches, pulse edamame and peas in a food prcoessor until a coarse purée forms, about 30 seconds. Transfer to a medium bowl. Stir in juice and next 3 ingredients. Gradually stir in 3/4 cup oil; mix well. Stir in 1/4 cup cilantro and 1/4 cup mint. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Transfer to a serving bowl; drizzle with oil and garnish with more herbs. Serve with endive spears.

edamame-hummus-with-garlic-scapes.name: Edamame Hummus With Garlic Scapes
instructions: Bring 6 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Add edamame; cook until soft, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain; refrigerate to cool, 10 minutes.
Combine cashews and 1 teaspoon salt in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped, scraping the sides of bowl as needed.
Add edamame, garlic scapes, lemon zest, lemon juice, remaining 2 teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon black pepper, and coriander; pulse until reaches desired consistency.
Pour ¾ cup oil in slowly with processor running until hummus is smooth; season with oil, salt, and black pepper.

edible-ginger-infused-cooking-oil.name: Edible Ginger-infused Cooking Oil
instructions: Lay ginger slices out on your dehydrator tray. Dry according to manufacturer's instructions, rotating every 20 to 30 minutes, until crisp and fragrant, about 2 hours.
Break up dried ginger into smaller pieces; transfer to a saucepan. Add coconut oil; heat gently over low heat until natural oils from ginger infuse the oil, at least 2 hours.
Strain ginger oil through a strainer to remove large pieces. Wrap cheesecloth over top of a glass jar. Pour ginger oil through cheesecloth into jar to strain again.

edirne-fried-liver-lezzet.name: Edirne Fried Liver
instructions: 1. Soğanları soyup piyaz şeklinde doğrayın.
2.  Sumak, tuz ve maydanozu ilave edip harmanlayın.
3. Ciğerin zarını soyup damar ve sinirlerinden ayırın.
4.  Yaprak inceliğinde dilimler kesin.
5.  Ciğer dilimlerini una bulayın.
6. Ayçiçeği yağını tavada kızdırıp ciğerleri birer dakika kadar çevirerek kızartın.
7.  Tuzla tatlandırıp servis tabağına alın.
8.  Garnitür ile birlikte servis yapın.
9. Ciğer tavayı, acılı ezme ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
10.  Afiyet olsun.
11. Ciğer Tava Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarifte kullanacağınız ciğerlerin ufak ufak doğranmasına özen gösterin.
12.  Bu sayede daha çabuk pişer ve kabuk oluşmaz.
13. Ciğerleri temizledikten sonra, 15 dakika süzgeçte bekleterek süzülmesini sağlayabilirsiniz.
14. Ciğerlerin aromatik bir tadı olması için, poşet içerisine un, mısır unu ve tuz koyun.
15.  Ciğerleri de bu poşete koyarak ağzını kapatıp çalkalayın.
16.  Bu sayede daha iyi harmanlanır.
17. Kızarttığınız ciğerleri, kağıt havluda bekleterek fazla yağını süzdürün.
18. 1 Porsiyon Ciğer Tava Kaç Kalori?Ciğer tavanın bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 175 kaloridir.
19.  Kolesterolü yükseltebileceği için ölçülü bir şekilde tüketilmelidir.

edirne-meatballs-lezzet.name: Edirne Meatballs
instructions: 1. Piyaz için haşlanmış fasulyeler, zeytinyağı, sumak, doğranmış kırmızı soğan, kıyılmış maydanoz, tuz ve karabiberi harmanlayınBeyaz soğanı soyup rendeleyin.
2.  Ekmek içlerini soğuk suyla ıslatıp ufalayın.
3.  Kıyma, kıyılmış soğan, ekmek içi, tuz ve karabiberi derin bir kapta yoğurun.
4.  Yumurtaları ekleyip tekrar yoğurun.
5.  Cevizden biraz daha büyükçe parçalar koparıp avucunuzun içinde yassılaştırarak köfteler hazırlayın.
6.  Köftelerin her iki tarafına zeytinyağı sürüp ızgarada kızartın.
7.  Servis tabağına alıp piyaz ile birlikte servis yapın.
8. Özgün yemekler arasında yer alan kadınbudu köfte tarifine de göz atın.

edys-peppermint-pie.name: Edy's Peppermint Pie

ingredients.item: Oreo® (regular or mint) or other creme-filled cookies
Quart edy's slow churned® peppermint ice cream
Chocolate syrup or hot fudge sauce

instructions: Place cookies in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until reaches consistency of fine crumbs. Transfer crumbs to a bowl; stir in butter. Press evenly into bottom and up sides of a 9-inch pie plate using your fingers. Freeze until firm, about 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, place ice cream in the refrigerator to soften, about 15 minutes, then scoop ice into crust, spreading evenly with a spatula. Pipe or spoon whipped topping around border of pie. Arrange small candy canes on top of pie. Freeze until ice cream is firm, about 3 hours.
Drizzle servings with chocolate syrup or hot fudge sauce.

eel-salad-comedera.name: Eel Salad
instructions: Primero que todo vamos a pasar las gulas por la sartén un poco. Picamos el diente de ajo bien pequeño. Ponemos un chorro de aceite de oliva y las gulas al fuego por un par de minutos. Retiramos y dejamos que se enfríe.
Lava bien la lechuga y corta las hojas con las manos. Ponla en una ensaladera.
Lava los tomates cherry y pícalos por la mitad. Échalos en la ensaladera.
También vas a lavar los rábanos y los vas a cortar en mitades, o en cuartos o en cualquier forma creativa que se te antoje. Ponlos junto al tomate y la lechuga.
Incorpora las gulas a la ensaladera
Agrega un poco de sal, una pizca de orégano, un poco de aceite de oliva y revuelve bien con una cuchara de palo.
Listo, ya tienes la ensalada con gulas hecha.

eel-sauce.name: Eel Sauce
instructions: Heat soy sauce, sugar, and mirin in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Cook and stir until liquid is reduced to about 3/4 cup.

effortless-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Effortless Soup Recipe
instructions: 1. Yoğurt, yumurta ve unu bir kasede pürüzsüz olana kadar çırpın.
2. Tencereye 5 su bardağı suyu alın.
3.  İsterseniz bu aşamada kemikli ilik suyunu da ekleyin ve ısıtın.
4. Kaynayan sudan 1–2 kepçe alıp terbiyeye ekleyin, hızlıca karıştırın.
5. Sonra terbiyeyi tencereye yavaş yavaş dökün.
6. Arpa şehriyeyi ilave edin.
7. Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
8.  (Şehriyeler dibe yapışmasın diye ara ara mutlaka karıştırın.
9. )Şehriyeler yumuşamaya başlayınca ezilmiş sarımsağı ekleyin.
10. Çorbanın kıvamı oturunca tuzunu ekleyin ve 1–2 dakika daha kaynatıp ocaktan alın.
11. Sos tavasına sıvı yağ ve tereyağını alın.
12. Yağ kızınca nane, pul biber ve karabiberi ekleyin.
13. 10–15 saniye çevirip çorbanın üzerine gezdirin ve servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

efo-riro-with-kale-and-whitefish.name: Efo Riro With Kale And Whitefish

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, cut into large pieces

ingredients.item: Skinless tilapia or other whitefish fillets (about 1 0.667lb. total)
Cube maggi shrimp or chicken bouillon

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into 2" pieces

instructions: Purée onion, tomatoes, bell pepper, chile, and garlic in a blender, adding up to ¼ cup water as needed, until smooth. Set purée aside.
Place bitter leaf in a small bowl and pour in hot water to cover. Let sit until softened, about 10 minutes. Drain and finely chop.

Meanwhile, toss fish with Old Bay seasoning in a large bowl to evenly coat. Pour vegetable oil into a large deep saucepan or medium Dutch oven to come ¼" up sides and heat over medium-high until shimmering. Working in batches, arrange fish in a single layer and fry, turning halfway through, until golden, 6–8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain.

Pour oil out from pan and wipe out. Heat olive oil in same saucepan over medium-high. Add tomato paste, thyme, garam masala, and turmeric. Cook, stirring, until spices are fragrant and tomato paste is slightly darkened in color, about 1 minute. Stir in reserved purée, scraping up any browned bits, then add bitter leaf, shrimp cube, dried shrimp, and irú. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat so stew is at a simmer and add kale by the handful, stir to wilt slightly before adding more. Once all of the kale has been added, cook (without stirring) until tender, about 5 minutes. Gently fold in fried fish, being careful not to break up too much.
Serve with yams or rice alongside.

egg-pimento-cheese-english-muffins.name: Egg & Pimento Cheese English Muffins

ingredients.item: Neutral cooking oil (such as canola oil)

instructions: Make the pimento cheese: Puree the cream cheese, mayonnaise, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne pepper, and 2 cups of the cheddar cheese in a food processor until mostly smooth but with some chunks remaining, 2–3 minutes.
Add the pimiento peppers, jalapeno, and remaining 2 cups of cheddar cheese. Process until small chunks of pepper and cheese remain, about 1 minute. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a large skillet over medium-low. Crack 3 of the eggs into the skillet, and sprinkle with salt. Cover with a lid, and cook until the top is firm but the yolk is still runny, for 1-2 minutes. Remove the lid, and cook until the egg edges turn crispy, 30–60 seconds. Transfer cooked eggs to a plate. Repeat the process with the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil and 3 eggs.

Spread a thin layer of the pimento cheese over each cut side of the toasted Thomas'® Buttermilk English Muffins. Place 1 egg on the bottom half of each English muffin, sprinkle smoked paprika, and top with the top half.
Enjoy!

egg-aguachile-recipe-comedera.name: Egg Aguachile Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ taza de zumo de limón

instructions: Cuece los huevos en agua hirviendo durante 10 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, enfríalos en agua con hielo para cortar la cocción y puedas pelar sin problemas.
Pela los huevos y córtalos a la mitad.
Pela la cebolla y corta en julianas.
Corta el chile jalapeño y el chile serrano en rodajitas.
Trocea muy bien el cilantro.
En un bol, coloca la cebolla, los chiles y el cilantro. Vierte el zumo de limón, salsa de soya y aceite de oliva.
Sazona con sal y pimienta y mezcla muy bien.
Coloca los huevos en un plato hondo y vierte las verduras con especias.
Mezcla un poco para que los huevos se impregnen muy bien.
Y listo, puedes disfrutarlo sólo o con unas tostadas de harina de maíz.

egg-and-avocado-breakfast-sandwich.name: Egg And Avocado Breakfast Sandwich

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Drained pickled cherry peppers or peppadew peppers

instructions: Heat broiler. Roast bell pepper on a broilerproof baking sheet, turning occasionally, until blackened in spots, 12–15 minutes. Place in a small bowl; cover tightly. Let sit 10 minutes. Peel and remove seeds.
Purée bell pepper, mango, brown sugar, vinegar, orange juice, lime juice, and cayenne in a blender, thinning with water as needed, until smooth; season with salt.
DO AHEAD: Hot sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Whisk eggs and milk in a medium bowl. Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Cook eggs, stirring, until mostly set but still runny in parts, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in cheese; season with salt and pepper. Build sandwiches with rolls, hot sauce, eggs, avocado, and cherry peppers.

egg-and-avocado-toast.name: Egg And Avocado Toast

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Toast bread on the highest setting until dark golden brown all over.

Heat a small pan over medium heat. Brush oil onto the hot pan and crack in the egg. Sprinkle sea salt, black pepper, and pepper flakes on top. Cover and cook until whites are set and yolk is still runny, about 3 minutes.

Scoop avocado onto the toast and spread evenly. Squeeze some lemon juice on top. Season with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Top with fried egg; pierce the yolk and spread it around. Squeeze in more lemon juice to taste and cut avocado toast in half for optimal enjoyment.

egg-and-cheese-breakfast-quesadillas.name: Egg And Cheese Breakfast Quesadillas
instructions: Beat 2 eggs with 1 1/2 tablespoons milk in a bowl.
Melt 1 teaspoon butter in a 6-inch frying pan over medium heat. Add bell pepper and onion; cook until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Remove 1/2 of the mixture and set aside in a bowl.

Pour egg mixture and remaining vegetable mixture into the skillet. Tilt the pan, gently push one side of the egg, without breaking it, away from the side of the pan, and let the uncooked egg run onto the pan. Repeat with all 4 sides of the egg, cooking until the bottom is set, about 2 minutes. Flip over and cook until bottom is slightly browned, 1 to 2 minutes more.

Slide omelet onto a tortilla, then slide tortilla back onto the pan. Place 1 cheese slice onto the omelet and top with another tortilla. Cook until the bottom is browned, about 2 minutes. Flip and brown opposite side, about 1 minute more. Slide quesadilla onto a plate and cut into 4 pieces.

Beat remaining 2 eggs and 1 1/2 tablespoons milk together in a bowl. Grease the same pan with remaining 1 teaspoon butter. Repeat steps 3 and 4 with reserved vegetable mixture and remaining cheese and tortillas.

egg-and-chorizo-burritos.name: Egg And Chorizo Burritos
instructions: Cook chorizo in a medium heavy skillet over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until chorizo is brown and fat is rendered, about 20 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer chorizo to a medium bowl. Drain all but 1 Tbsp. drippings from pan; set pan aside.

Preheat broiler. Divide tortillas between 2 baking sheets; sprinkle half of cheese over, dividing equally; set aside. Heat drippings in reserved skillet over medium-low heat; add eggs and cook, stirring occasionally, until eggs are just set, about 4 minutes.
Cook tortillas until warmed through and cheese begins to melt, about 20 seconds.

Working quickly, top tortillas with chorizo and eggs, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with remaining half of cheese and cilantro. Working one at a time, fold in top and bottom ends of tortillas, then roll up, starting from an unfolded side, into burritos.

egg-and-date-dessert-lezzet.name: Egg And Date Dessert
instructions: 1. Fazla zaman harcamadan hazırlayacağınız yapımı kolay, sunumu şık lezzete ne dersiniz.
2.  Su ve şekeri kaynatıp ılınmaya bırakın.
3.  Tereyağını eritip hurmaları kavurun.
4.  Üzerine çırpılmış yumurtaları döküp kısık ateşte pişirin.
5.  Şerbeti üzerine gezdirip servis yapın.

egg-and-merguez-wraps.name: Egg And Merguez Wraps
instructions: Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Carefully slip in eggs and cook 8 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water with a slotted spoon; let cool. Peel eggs, then slice each crosswise into 5 pieces.
Meanwhile, mix yogurt, lemon juice, and garlic in a small bowl; season yogurt sauce with salt.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add sausage and press down on it with a wooden spoon or heatproof rubber spatula to flatten; cook, undisturbed, until browned underneath, about 4 minutes. Turn sausage over; break into smaller pieces with spoon. Cook until cooked through and crisp, about 3 minutes. Transfer sausage along with drippings to a medium bowl. Reserve skillet.

Lay out lavash on a work surface. Spread ¼ cup yogurt sauce over each, leaving a 1" border. Top with sausage, dividing evenly. Top each with 10 egg slices in a single layer, then with red onion, pickles, and mint. Fold in 2 sides of lavash and, starting at an unfolded edge, roll up tightly.

Set reserved skillet over medium heat and cook 2 wraps, undisturbed, until golden brown and starting to crisp underneath, about 2 minutes. Turn over and cook until golden brown and starting to crisp on the other side. Transfer to a cutting board. Repeat with remaining wraps. Cut wraps in half crosswise.

egg-and-salad-sandwich-lezzet.name: Egg And Salad Sandwich
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları katı olacak şekilde pişirin ve ılınmaya bırakın.
2.  Kabuklarını soyup küçük doğrayın ve bir kaseye alın.
3.  Havucu rendeleyerek ekleyin.
4.  Turşu ve közlenmiş biberi doğrayın.
5.  Tuz, karabiber, dereotu ve mayonezi ekleyip karıştırın.
6.  Ekmeği ikiye parçaya kesip arasına yumurta salatasını paylaştırın.
7.  Marul ve domates dilimlerini ekmeklerin arasına yerleştirip servis yapın.

egg-and-tomato-salad-argiro.name: Egg And Tomato Salad
instructions: Για την σαλάτα με αυγά και ντομάτα, ανακατεύουμε πρώτα σε ένα μεγάλο μπολ όλα τα υλικά μαζί για να ενωθούν οι γεύσεις.
Ανακατεύουμεμε προσοχή για να μη διαλύσουμε τα βραστά αυγά.
Αφήνουμε την αυγοσαλάτα να σταθεί για 10΄ πριν τη σερβίρουμε.
Είναι εκπληκτικός μεζές με φρυγανισμένο ψωμί!
Επίσης, μπορούμε να προσθέσουμε και δύο αντσούγιες ψιλοκομμένες για πιο πικάντικη γεύση.
Αυτή η εύκολη συνταγή είναι ιδανική για να αξιοποιήσουμε τα βραστά αυγά που μας περίσσεψαν, ή τα Πασχαλινά αυγά που δεν βάφτηκαν καλά, ή έσπασαν κατά το βάψιμο.

egg-bake-with-sausage-bacon-and-veggies.name: Egg Bake With Sausage, Bacon, And Veggies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir sausage in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease.
Meanwhile, heat oil in another skillet over medium heat. Add spinach and saute until just wilted, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
Transfer spinach to the prepared baking pan; sprinkle in bell pepper, tomato, and onion. Add 1/2 of the Cheddar cheese. Sprinkle in sausage and bacon bits. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Mix eggs, oregano, basil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder together in a blender until combined. Pour mixture into the baking pan over the vegetables and meats.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

egg-bhurji-strata.name: Egg Bhurji Strata

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, thinly sliced
leaves and tender stems coarsely chopped, plus more for serving
preferably day-old, cut or torn into 1" pieces (about 5 cups)

instructions: Butter an 8x8" or 9x9" baking dish with unsalted butter.
Whisk 7 large eggs, 1¾ cups whole milk, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until well combined. Season with freshly ground black pepper and set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter and 2 tsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium until butter is melted. Cook ½ tsp. cumin seeds, stirring constantly, until fragrant and starting to pop, about 1 minute. Reduce heat to medium-low and add 2 large leeks, white and pale green parts only, thinly sliced; season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until leeks are very soft and starting to brown, 8–10 minutes. Increase heat to medium and add 1 medium red bell pepper, cut into ½" pieces. Cook, stirring often, until pepper is beginning to soften, about 3 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, and one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add 1 tsp. garam masala, 1 tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. ground cumin, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, and ½ tsp. mild chile powder and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Scrape mixture into a large bowl and let cool slightly. Stir in ½ medium bunch cilantro, leaves and tender stems coarsely chopped, ¼ medium red onion, chopped, 9 oz. sourdough bread, preferably day-old, cut or torn into 1" pieces, and 1½ cups coarsely grated sharp cheddar; season with salt and pepper. Transfer to prepared baking dish and spread out into an even layer. Pour reserved egg mixture over; gently press down on strata to help bread absorb egg mixture. Scatter remaining ½ cup coarsely grated sharp cheddar over. Cover strata and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Bake strata until top is golden brown and a knife inserted into center comes out clean, 45–50 minutes. Let cool slightly, then cut into squares. Serve topped with more cilantro and Cilantro Chutney, if desired.
Do Ahead: Strata can be baked 3 days ahead. Let cool completely; cover and chill. Reheat in a 375° oven until hot, 20–25 minutes.

egg-bites-in-the-instant-pot.name: Egg Bites In The Instant Pot®
instructions: Spray egg molds with nonstick cooking spray. Sprinkle crumbled bacon into the molds.

Combine shredded cheese, cottage cheese, half-and-half, eggs, and salt in a blender; process until smooth. Divide mixture equally amongst the molds, filling each about 3/4 full. Cover with foil, wrapping tightly around the edges of the molds.

Pour water into the inner pot of a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®). Close and lock the lid. Select steam setting according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 8 minutes. Allow 5 to 10 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, for 10 minutes. Release remaining pressure carefully using the quick-release method, about 5 minutes.
Hold the mold over a wire rack and gently push egg bites out. Serve immediately or cool and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.

egg-bread-dessert-lezzet.name: Egg Bread Dessert
instructions: 1. Bayat ekmeklerinizi değerlendirebileceğiniz hem pratik hem de enfes bir tatlı.
2.  Ekmekleri fırın ızgarasında hafif kızartın.
3.  Yumurtaları bir kapta çatalla çırpın.
4.  Ayçiçeği yağını derin bir tencerede ısıtın.
5.  Kızarttığınız ekmekleri yumurtaya bulayıp kızgın yağda her iki taraflarını da kızartın.
6.  Şerbeti için tüm malzemeyi kaynatıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Kızarttığınız ekmekleri sıcakken soğuk şerbete atıp iyice çekmesini bekleyin.
8.  Kaymak ve çikolatalı sos ile servis yapın.

egg-breakfast-cups.name: Egg Breakfast Cups
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a measuring cup, beat the eggs until smooth.
Set aside.
In a greased muffin tin, place your desired combination of fillings into each muffin cup.
Season each cup with salt and pepper.
Pour the beaten eggs into each muffin cup until the liquid almost reaches the top.
Bake for 20 minutes, until set.
Enjoy!

egg-bug-lezzet.name: Egg Bug
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları geniş bir karıştırma kasesinde çırpın.
2.  Çok ince kıydığınız sebzeler ve unu ilave edin.
3.  Tuz ve kırmızı pul biberle tatlandırıp harç kıvam alıncaya kadar karıştırın.
4. Bir yumurta pişirme ya da özel öcce tavasının göz yerlerine ay çiçek yağı dökün.
5.  Harçtan bir yemek kaşığı kadar alarak kızgın yağa ilave edin.
6.  Her iki tarafını da kızartın.
7.  Kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla yağını çektirin.
8. Domates sosu için rendelediğiniz domatesleri bir sos tenceresine alın.
9.  Toz şeker, tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırıp domatesler suyunu çekinceye kadar pişirin.
10.  Öcceleri yanında domates sosu ile beraber sıcak servis yapın.

egg-burritos-with-nopales-step-by-step-c.name: Egg Burritos With Nopales, Step By Step
egg-burritos-with-nopales-step-by-step-c.original_name: Burritos de huevo con nopales, paso a paso
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra, colocando una olla con agua al fuego y añadiendo los nopales picados junto al diente de ajo. Deja cocinar hasta que estén bien tiernos y blandos. Aproximadamente 8 minutos de cocción. Retira y reserva.
En una sartén, añade aceite. Cuando esté caliente saltea la cebolla a fuego medio.
Procede a filetear el jalapeño sin dejarle semillas y lo incorporarás al sartén. Mezcla y deja cocinar hasta que la cebolla esté transparente.
Ahora, es el turno de agregar los nopales y el orégano, mezcla y deja cocinar 3 minutos.
En un bol, bate tus huevos hasta que levanten bien.
Ahora, agrega los huevos sobre las verduras, luego añade el tomate y condimenta con sal y pimienta. Revuelve.
Cocina hasta que tus huevos estén cuajados o hayan tomado la consistencia deseada.
Sírvelos en una tortilla y dale la forma de burrito.
¡Disfruta!

egg-candy-semifreddo-teleculinaria.name: Egg Candy Semifreddo

ingredients.item: 100 g de manteiga à temperatura ambiente

instructions: Prepare o bolo: bata, no liquidificador, a manteiga com os ovos e o leite. Adicione o açúcar, o chocolate, a farinha e o fermento e mexa bem. Deite numa forma, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 30 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e, depois, desfaça.

Prepare o creme: demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante alguns minutos. Bata as natas em chantili, adicione o leite condensado e, depois, a gelatina, previamente escorrida e derretida no micro-ondas, mexendo, até ficar bem dissolvida. Reserve.

Prepare o doce de ovos: leve ao lume 100 ml de água com o açúcar, até obter ponto de pérola. Dissolva a farinha maisena nas gemas desfeitas. Adicione-lhes a calda em fio, com cuidado e sem parar de mexer. Deite no tacho e leve novamente ao lume, até engrossar um pouco.

Numa taça de vidro, disponha parte do bolo desfeito e cubra com um pouco do creme, as bolachas passadas por café e um pouco do doce de ovos. Repita as camadas, terminando com o doce de ovos. Leve ao frio até ficar bem fresco.

egg-chestnuts-from-viseu-teleculinaria.name: Egg Chestnuts From Viseu
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com o açúcar e um pouco de água e deixe ferver, até obter ponto de bola rija. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer um pouco.
Junte 20 gemas, previamente misturadas (mas não batidas), e leve novamente ao lume, mexendo de um lado para o outro. Retire do lume quando se despegar do tacho e deixe arrefecer completamente.
Passe as mãos por farinha e molde bolinhas com a massa anterior. Calque-as com os dentes de um garfo e disponha-as em forminhas de papel plissado.
Ponto de bola rija Deite algumas gotas da calda num copo de água fria. Se estas não forem moldáveis e se quebrarem sob a pressão dos dedos, a calda atingiu o ponto de bola rija.

egg-cream-with-orange-and-cinnamon-telec.name: Egg Cream With Orange And Cinnamon
egg-cream-with-orange-and-cinnamon-telec.original_name: Creme de ovos com laranja e canela
instructions: Num tacho, bata os ovos com o açúcar. À parte, dissolva a farinha no sumo de laranja, acrescente ao preparado anterior e mexa bem. Leve a lume brando até engrossar, mexendo sempre e sem deixar ferver.
Adicione a manteiga e misture rapidamente. Deite numa taça e deixe arrefecer. Polvilhe com canela e decore com laranja e hortelã. Sirva frio.

egg-cups-and-bacon-soldiers.name: Egg Cups And Bacon Soldiers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 190°C (191°C).
Cut the crusts off the bread.
Slice the bacon in half lengthways, and wrap a piece around each crust. Place them on a baking tray.
Brush cupcake tin with melted butter. Press the bread into the muffin tin, then brush more butter onto the bread.
Bake the bacon soldiers for 10 minutes til they are about halfway cooked and starting to render their fat.
At the same time, bake bread cups for 10 minutes or until the bread is turning golden brown.
Flip the bacon. Crack an egg into each bread cup. Season with salt and pepper.
Bake the bacon soldiers for another 10-12 minutes until the bacon is crispy. At the same time, bake the eggs for another 10-12 minutes until they are just cooked.
Dip and Enjoy!

egg-drop-dumpling-soup.name: Egg Drop Dumpling Soup
instructions: Remove dark green tops from 4 scallions and thinly slice; set aside for serving. Chop white and pale green parts and transfer to a medium Dutch oven. Pour in 4 cups low-sodium chicken or other broth and 2 cups water; reserve measuring glass for whisking eggs. Set pot over high heat and bring liquid to a boil.

Meanwhile, whisk 1 tsp. cornstarch or potato starch and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until starch is dissolved. Whisk 2 large eggs and a pinch of kosher salt in reserved measuring glass until eggs are well blended. Whisk slurry into eggs, then set aside.

Carefully add 10–12 oz. frozen dumplings of choice to pot and stir to separate any dumplings that might be sticking together. Cook until dumplings are halfway cooked through, about half the cook time of the package directions (1–2 minutes for most brands).
Reduce heat to medium-low and add one 5-oz. bag baby spinach, carefully submerging leaves, and cook, stirring gently so as not to break any dumplings, just until wilted, about 30 seconds.
Stir 2 Tbsp. low-sodium soy sauce and 1 Tbsp. fish sauce into soup. Taste and add more soy sauce and/or season with salt if needed.

Reduce heat to low. Give reserved egg mixture a brief stir just to reincorporate slurry if needed, then gradually pour into soup in a steady stream, stirring constantly to incorporate. Remove pot from heat. Scatter reserved scallion tops over soup, then drizzle with 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame oil.
Ladle soup into shallow bowls, making sure to distribute dumplings among the bowls as evenly as possible.

egg-eyes-argiro.name: Egg Eyes
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε ένα τηγάνι και χωρίς λιπαρή ουσία ροδίζουμε το μπέικον σε μέτρια φωτιά, να γίνει τραγανό.
Το βγάζουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί να στραγγίσει το περιττό λίπος και να κρυώσει.
Κόβουμε τα μανιτάρια και τα ντοματίνια στη μέση.
Τα ρίχνουμε στο λίπος του τηγανιού και τα σοτάρουμε για 5΄ σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά μέχρι τα μανιτάρια να ροδίσουν και τα ντοματίνια να μελώσουν.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και τα βγάζουμε σε πιάτο.
Χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά.
Βάζουμε το ελαιόλαδο στο ίδιο τηγάνι.
Προσεκτικά σπάμε τα αυγά .
Σιγοτηγανίζουμε τα αυγά μέχρι να σταθεροποιηθεί το ασπράδι αλλά ο κρόκος να παραμείνει μελάτος, για περίπου 5΄.
Τα αλατοπιπερώνουμε και ρίχνουμε ξανά στα αυγά το τραγανό μπέικον, τα μανιτάρια και τα ντοματίνια.
Πασπαλίζουμε με το θυμάρι.
Συνοδεύουμε με πράσινη σαλάτα .

egg-fried-rice.name: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: This fried rice comes together really quickly, so it's important that all of your ingredients are prepped and ready to go before you start cooking. First up: broccoli. Holding onto broccoli stem, shave around the head with a chef’s knife and let the florets fall onto cutting board. If the pieces seem too large, break them down further into bite-sized pieces. Remove an inch or so of woody end of the stem. Use a vegetable peeler or paring knife to peel the remaining stem, then coarsely chop into pieces about the same size as florets so they'll cook at the same rate. Transfer broccoli to a medium bowl.
Trim 1 bunch scallions on both ends, then cut crosswise into 1" pieces. Transfer to bowl with broccoli.
Whisk 4 eggs in another medium bowl to combine and season with ½ tsp. salt.
Whisk 1 Tbsp. sugar, 4 tsp. soy sauce, and 1 tsp. salt in a small bowl. Grate 1" piece ginger and 2 garlic cloves into bowl and give the sauce another whisk.

Time to cook! Bring all of your prepped ingredients to the stove. Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet—or non-stick if you don't have one—over medium-high until just beginning to smoke. Add broccoli and scallions, season with a good pinch of salt, and toss with a spatula to coat in oil. Cook, undisturbed, until well charred on one side, about 5 minutes. When we say "undisturbed," we mean it! You need consistent, direct contact with the hot pan in order to get color on the veggies, so resist the urge to constantly fuss with them. Mix with spatula and continue to cook, tossing occasionally, until broccoli is crisp-tender and scallions are wilted, about 2 more minutes. Transfer veggies back to the bowl they came from.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil in skillet over medium-low. Add eggs and cook, stirring constantly with a rubber spatula, until large curds begin to form, about 30 seconds. The eggs will cook very quickly, so try to err on the side of runny and less-cooked because they can become spongy if overcooked.

Add 3 cups rice and soy sauce mixture to eggs. Toss well to combine, then press down evenly into skillet. Cook, undisturbed, until rice is slightly crisped on one side, about 5 minutes. (Remember: undisturbed!)
Return veggies to skillet and toss well to combine. Remove from heat, add 2 Tbsp. sesame oil and 2 Tbsp. vinegar, and toss once more.
Divide fried rice among bowls and serve.

egg-fritters-with-merenda-argiro.name: Egg Fritters With Merenda

ingredients.item: 4 κ.σ.corn flakes απλά (σπασμένα σε μικρά κομμάτια)
4 κ.σ.corn flakes απλά (σπασμένα σε μικρά κομμάτια)

instructions: Σε ένα μπολ χτυπάμε τα υγρά υλικά (αυγά, γάλα, βανίλια, αλάτι) και τα αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Αλείφουμε δύο φέτες ψωμί με βούτυρο και μερέντα.
Σκεπάζουμε με τις άλλες δύο φέτες ψωμί και πιέζουμε ελαφρά για να κολλήσουν, σχηματίζοντας σάντουιτς.
Τοποθετούμε τα σάντουιτς σε πυρίμαχο σκεύος και τα περιχύνουμε με το υγρό μείγμα.
Τα αφήνουμε να σταθούν για 2–3 λεπτά και τα αναποδογυρίζουμε, ώστε να μουσκέψουν και από την άλλη πλευρά — χωρίς να ρουφήξουν πολύ, για να μη διαλυθούν.
Σε ένα φαρδύ μπολ βάζουμε τα σπασμένα corn flakes και πανάρουμε τις αυγοφέτες και από τις δύο πλευρές, να καλυφθούν ομοιόμορφα.
Ζεσταίνουμε το τηγάνι σε μέτρια προς χαμηλή φωτιά και λιώνουμε το βούτυρο.
Ροδίζουμε κάθε σάντουιτς για 2–3 λεπτά από κάθε πλευρά, μέχρι να γίνει τραγανό και χρυσαφένιο.
Μεταφέρουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί για λίγα λεπτά.
Σερβίρουμε τις αυγοφέτες με λίγη έξτρα μερέντα, φράουλες ή μπανάνα.

egg-fritters-with-toasted-bread-argiro.name: Egg Fritters With Toasted Bread

ingredients.item: 4-6 κ.σ.πραλίνα σοκολάτας ή 125 γρ. τριμμένη σοκολάτα της αρεσκείας σας
4-6 κ.σ.πραλίνα σοκολάτας ή 125 γρ. τριμμένη σοκολάτα της αρεσκείας σας

instructions: Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε πυρίμαχο μακρόστενο σκεύος 23×33 εκ.
Σε μπολ χτυπάμε με σύρμα τα αυγά , τη βανίλια, το αλάτι και το γάλα να ενωθούν.
Αλείφουμε με το βούτυρο όλη την επιφάνεια του ταψιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε επάνω την μαύρη ζάχαρη φροντίζοντας να καλύψουμε και τα τοιχώματα.
Απλώνουμε 2-2 φέτες ψωμί ενωμένες, κάνοντας μια παχιά στρώση στη βάση του ταψιού και κόβοντας τες λίγο αν χρειαστεί για να γεμίσει η βάση και οι γωνιές του ταψιού.
Περιχύνουμε σιγά σιγά με 1 -1/2 φλ. μείγμα αυγό – γάλα.
Ρίχνουμε σε μια στρώση τις καραμελωμένες μπανάνες και καλύπτουμε με την πραλίνα.
Σκεπάζουμε τα υλικά με το υπόλοιπο ψωμί. Η επιφάνεια του ταψιού καλύπτεται με 6 ολόκληρες φέτες και μισή φέτα κομμένη στη μέση.
Πιέζουμε ελαφρά να κολλήσουν οι στρώσεις μεταξύ τους.
Περιχύνουμε με τα υπόλοιπα υγρά (αυγά – γάλα) και αφήνουμε να σταθεί και να ρουφήξει για 30′.
Αν έχετε χρόνο, όσο περισσότερο το αφήσετε να ποτίσει το ψωμί, τόσο πιο αφράτο και νόστιμο θα γίνει το γλυκό.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 170ºC στον αέρα, στην μεσαία σχάρα, για 35′ περίπου μέχρι να ροδίσει ελαφρά και να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Αφήνουμε για 10′ στον πάγκο.
Κόβουμε σε κομμάτια και σερβίρουμε με λίγη άχνη ή περιχύνουμε με λίγο μέλι.

egg-korma.name: Egg Korma
instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil over medium-high heat. Using a slotted spoon, carefully lower eggs into water one at a time. Immediately set a timer for 7 minutes and cook eggs, maintaining a low boil. Carefully transfer eggs to a large bowl of ice water and let cool until just slightly warm, about 2 minutes. Gently crack eggs all over and peel, starting from the fat end containing the air pocket. Gently dry eggs with a clean dish towel.
While eggs cook, purée ginger, garlic, yogurt, cardamom, cinnamon, pepper, and half of onion in a blender until smooth; set aside.

Heat ghee in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high until it sizzles as soon as an egg hits the skillet, about 1 minute. Fry whole eggs, rotating twice to get golden brown and crispy on 3 sides, about 5 minutes total. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to a plate, leaving ghee behind; generously season eggs with salt.

Add remaining onion to skillet and cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until browned and crisp, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon and leaving as much fat in skillet as possible, transfer half of fried onions to plate with eggs (but keep them separate); season with salt.
Add apricots to skillet with remaining fried onions and cook over medium-high heat, stirring frequently, until just starting to blister, about 1 minute.

Add reserved yogurt purée and cook, stirring frequently and smashing against sides and bottom of pan (the yogurt paste will begin to stick to pan and darken—this is what you want; just keep stirring and smashing until you get there), until yogurt cooks down and purée is the color of gravy, 5–7 minutes.
