Colocamos las berenjenas, si el aceite los cubre completamente vamos a freír por 3 minutos, si queda una parte a flote lo dejamos sólo dos minutos por el segundo lado.
Retiramos de la sartén con la ayuda de una espumadera y dejamos reposar sobre un colador con papel absorbente.

eggplant-tikkas-in-creamy-yogurt-mustard.name: Eggplant Tikkas In Creamy Yogurt, Mustard, Chile, And Ginger

ingredients.prep: quartered and cut into large chunks

instructions: To make the marinade, blend the garlic, ginger, and green chiles with a splash of water in a blender. Put the paste in a large mixing bowl along with the yogurt, chile powder, ground coriander, and turmeric. Add the mustard oil, fenugreek leaves, and sugar, then season to taste. Stir well. Meanwhile, soak wooden skewers in cold water for 30 minutes.

Set aside half the marinade in a separate bowl. Add the chunks of eggplant and red onion to the marinade in the large mixing bowl. Mix well to make sure each piece is fully coated in the marinade. Set aside for 1 hour.

Meanwhile, tip the reserved marinade into a non-stick frying pan. Cook over medium heat for 6–7 minutes, stirring continuously to make sure it doesn’t stick to the bottom of the pan, until the marinade thickens and changes color slightly. Transfer this marinade to a mixing bowl, cover and set aside.
Preheat the broiler to medium heat. Line a baking tray with foil and place a wire rack over the tray.

Thread the eggplant pieces onto soaked wooden skewers, alternating them with the onion pieces. Place the skewers on the wire rack and broil for 7–8 minutes. Take the tray out from under the broiler, baste with the butter, put it back under the broiler and cook for a further 6–7 minutes until lightly charred and cooked through.
Add the broiled eggplants and onions to the bowl with the cooked marinade. Add a generous pinch of chaat masala and small pinch of garam masala before serving. Serve warm with roti and chutney.

eggplant-tomato-salad.name: Eggplant Tomato Salad
instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Toss eggplant with 1 tablespoon olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Place onto a baking sheet and arrange in a single layer.
Broil eggplant in the preheated oven, until browned on all sides, 5 to 7 minutes, turning occasionally.
Transfer cooked eggplant to a large bowl. Add tomatoes and onion.
Combine remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Pour dressing over salad.

eggplant-tortas-milanesa.name: Eggplant Tortas Milanesa
instructions: Mix 1 small red onion, thinly sliced, juice of 1 lime, and a big pinch of kosher salt in a small bowl. Let sit while you prepare remaining components for tortas, at least 15 minutes.
Coarsely chop 2 chiles from one 7-oz. can of chiles in adobo. Mix chopped chiles, ½ cup mayonnaise, and 2 Tbsp. adobo sauce from can in another small bowl. Set chipotle mayo aside.

Slice 1 medium globe eggplant (about 12 oz.) into ⅓"-thick rounds. Place ½ cup all-purpose flour in a shallow bowl. Lightly beat 2 large eggs in another shallow bowl to blend. Place 2 cups panko in a third shallow bowl; season each with salt. Working one at a time, dredge eggplant slices in flour, shaking off excess, then dip in egg, letting excess drip back into bowl. Dredge in seasoned panko, pressing to adhere. Transfer to a baking sheet.

Pour vegetable oil into a large skillet to come ¼" up sides and heat over medium-high. Working in batches, cook eggplant until golden brown and crisp, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack and immediately season with salt.

Spread reserved chipotle mayo over cut sides of 4 bolillo or ciabatta rolls, split. Build tortas with eggplant, 8 oz. quesillo (Oaxaca cheese) or fresh mozzarella, sliced, drained pickled red onion, 2 avocados, thinly sliced, ⅓ cup sliced pickled jalapeños, and ⅓ cup chopped cilantro.

eggplant-tsakonikas-in-a-jar-argiro.name: Eggplant Tsakonikas In A Jar
instructions: Διαλέγουμε μικρές τσακώνικες μελιτζάνες.
Τις πλένουμε και τις κόβουμε κατά μήκος στα τέσσερα.
Βάζουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα το ξίδι, το νερό και το αλάτι.
Μόλις πάρουν βράση, χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά, ρίχνουμε μέσα τις μελιτζάνες και σιγοβράζουμε 4-5 λεπτά.
Τις στραγγίζουμε και βάζουμε επάνω στο σουρωτήρι βάρος για να αποβάλουν τα περισσότερα υγρά τους.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο να κάψει και μετά το αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά.
Ρίχνουμε μέσα το πιπέρι, τις πιπερίτσες, τα μυρωδικά και το σκόρδο.
Σε αποστειρωμένο βάζο, στήνουμε όρθιες τις μελιτζάνες και περιχύνουμε με το αρωματικό ελαιόλαδο μέχρι να καλυφθούν καλά.
Σφραγίζουμε το βάζο και το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Το διατηρούμε στο ψυγείο για 1 μήνα. Τρώγονται μετά από 2 ημέρες.

eggplant-volovan-lezzet.name: Eggplant Volovan
instructions: 1. Hamurları yumuşaması için 15 dakika oda sıcaklığında bekletin.
2.  Yuvarlak bir kalıpla her bir hamurdan iki parça kesin.
3. 12 tanesini kenarlardan 1 cm kalacak kadar daha küçük bir kalıpla ortasından keserek halka şekli verin.
4.  Halka şeklindeki hamurları yuvarlak hamurların üzerine yapıştırın.
5.  Yağlı kağıt serilmiş bir tepsiye dizin.
6.  Hamurların kenarlarına fırça yardımıyla yumurta sarısı sürün ve 200 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında üzeri kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
7.  Fırından çıkarıp soğumaya bırakın.
8. Patlıcanları fırın ızgarasında ara ara çevirerek iyice yumuşayıncaya kadar közleyin.
9.  Kabuklarını soyup suyunu süzün ve bir kaseye alın.
10.  İçine sarımsak rendeleyin.
11.  Tahin, tuz, karabiber, pulbiber ekleyip karıştırın.
12.  Karışımı volovanların içine doldurun.
13.  Üzerlerini taze kekik ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
14. Demir deposu olarak bilinen ıspanaklı volovan tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

eggplant-with-asian-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Eggplant With Asian Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 adet çin patlıcanı (veya uzun mor kemer patlıcan)
1 yemek kaşığı pirinç sirkesi (veya elma sirkesi)

instructions: 1. Patlıcanları uzunlamasına ortadan ikiye kesin, sonra iri verev parçalar halinde doğrayın.
2.  Tuzlayıp 10 dakika bekletin, ardından kağıt havlu ile kurulayın.
3. Geniş bir tavada yağı ısıtın.
4.  Patlıcanları birkaç parti halinde altın sarısı olana kadar kızartın.
5.  Kağıt havluya alın.
6. Küçük bir kasede soya sosu, sirke, şeker, acı sos, nişasta ve suyu karıştırın.
7. Aynı tavada biraz yağ ile sarımsak (ve varsa zencefil) soteleyin.
8.  Patlıcanları tekrar tavaya alın.
9. Hazırladığınız sosu ekleyin.
10.  Karıştırarak 2-3 dakika pişirin; sos koyulaşınca ocaktan alın.
11. Üzerine kavrulmuş susam ve taze doğranmış kişniş serpin.
12.  Sıcak servis yapın.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

eggplant-with-bacon-miso.name: Eggplant With Bacon Miso

ingredients.item: Vegetable oil plus more for baking sheet

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Cook bacon in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until crisp, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in miso and mirin.

Cut eggplants in half lengthwise. Using the tip of a paring knife, score cut sides in a crosshatch pattern. Brush cut sides with 2 tablespoons oil, dividing evenly, then spread scant 1 tablespoon bacon-miso mixture over each half. Place on an oiled rimmed baking sheet.
Roast eggplant until tender and lightly browned, 20–25 minutes. Top with scallions.

eggplant-with-buttermilk-sauce.name: Eggplant With Buttermilk Sauce

ingredients.item: Lemon thyme leaves (regular thyme will do)
ingredients.prep: plus a few whole sprigs to garnish

ingredients.item: Maldon sea salt and black pepper

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Cut the eggplants in half lengthways, cutting straight through the green stalk (the stalk is for the look; don't eat it). Use a small sharp knife to make three or four parallel incisions in the cut side of each eggplant half, without cutting through to the skin. Repeat at a 45-degree angle to get a diamond-shaped pattern.

Place the eggplant halves, cut-side up, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush them with olive oil—keep on brushing until all of the oil has been absorbed by the flesh. Sprinkle with the lemon thyme leaves and some salt and pepper. Roast for 35 to 40 minutes, at which point the flesh should be soft, flavorful, and nicely browned. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.

While the eggplants are in the oven, cut the pomegranate into two horizontally. Hold one half over a bowl, with the cut side against your palm, and use the back of a wooden spoon or a rolling pin to gently knock on the pomegranate skin. Continue beating with increasing power until the seeds start coming out naturally and falling through your fingers into the bowl. Once all are there, sift through the seeds and remove any bits of white skin or membrane.
To make the sauce, whisk together all of the ingredients. Taste for seasoning, then keel cold until needed.

To serve, spoon plenty of buttermilk sauce over the eggplant halves without covering the stalks. Sprinkle za'atar and plenty of pomegranate seeds on top and garnish with lemon thyme. Finish with a drizzle of olive oil.

eggplant-with-cheese-lezzet.name: Eggplant With Cheese

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri

instructions: 1. Patlıcanları yıkayıp enine ikiye kesin.
2.  İç kısımlarına zeytinyağı sürüp 200 derece fırında yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Patlıcanların kenarlarından 1 cm kadar boşluk bırakıp içlerini kaşıkla çıkartın.
4.  Sarımsağı rendeleyip hafifçe zeytinyağında kavurun.
5.  Küp doğranmış domatesleri, kimyon, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip 3-4 dakika pişirin.
6.  Patlıcan içlerini ekleyip soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Karışıma küp doğranmış jambon, lor peyniri, rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri ve çırpılmış yumurtayı ekleyin ve patlıcanların içlerine doldurun.
8.  190 derece fırında 30 dakika pişirin.
9.  Sıcak servis yapın.

eggplant-with-molasses-lezzet.name: Eggplant With Molasses
instructions: 1. Davetlerinizde hazırladığınız mezelerle farklılık yaratın.
2.  Patlıcanları alüminyum folyoya sarıp ocağın üzerinde közleyip kabuklarını soyun.
3.  Patlıcanların içlerini süzme yoğurt ve tuz ile karıştırıp servis tabağına alın.
4.  Üzerine üzüm pekmezi gezdirin.
5.  İri çekilmiş Antep fıstığı ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

eggplant-wrap-with-tulum-cheese-lezzet.name: Eggplant Wrap With Tulum Cheese
instructions: 1. Tulum peyniri ve lor peynirini bir kaseye alıp çatalla ezerek karıştırın.
2.  Bulguru kaynar suya ekleyip yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın ve suyunu iyice süzün.
3.  Peynirli karışıma ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Kıyılmış taze nane ve taze çekilmiş karabiber ekleyip tekrar karıştırın.
5.  Sos için, soğan ve sarımsağın kabuklarını temizleyip kıyın.
6.  Domateslerin kabuğunu soyup küçük küp şeklinde kesin.
7.  Riviera zeytinyağını tavaya alıp ısıtın.
8.  Soğan ve sarımsağı ekleyip kısık ateşte kavurun.
9.  Domatesi ekleyip kavurmaya devam edin.
10.  Suyu ilave edip pişirin.
11.  Kıyılmış taze reyhan ekleyip tavayı ocak üzerinden alın.
12.  Patlıcanları yıkayıp kurulayın.
13.  Sap kısımlarını kesip uzunlamasına ince dilimleyin.
14.  Patlıcan dilimlerini ısıtılmış riviera zeytinyağında kızartın.
15.  Fazla yağı süzmek için kağıt havlu üzerine alın.
16.  Tepeleme tatlı kaşığı dolusu peynir harcını patlıcan dilimlerinin uç kısımlarına koyarak patlıcan dilimlerini rulo şeklinde sarın.
17.  Fırın tepsisine dizin.
18.  200 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
19.  Yanında sosuyla birlikte servis yapın.

eggplant-wraps.name: Eggplant Wraps

ingredients.item: Sunflower oil or light olive oil

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. You will need a large non-stick baking sheet.
Cut the woody top off each eggplant and discard. Slice each eggplant lengthwise into 8 pieces (16 in all) about 1/2 inch thick.

Mix the oil and the herbs together in a small bowl or cup. Lightly brush each slice of eggplant with the herby oil on both sides. Heat a large frying pan over medium heat and lay as many pieces of the eggplant in the pan as will comfortably fit. Fry each side until golden brown and softened, which should be about 3 minutes per side. When all the slices are cooked, set them aside.
Wash the spinach well in cold running water, then toss it in a hot medium saucepan (using just the water that is clinging to the leaves) until wilted, and drain off the excess liquid.

Now, assemble each wrap by taking 1 slice of the cooked eggplant and placing a little of the wilted spinach on one side. Then lay a piece of sundried tomato on top, sprinkle a few toasted pine nuts over it, and top with a slice of Cheddar. Fold the eggplant over to form the wrap, then place it on a large non-stick baking sheet.
Repeat this until all 16 wraps are assembled and placed side by side on the baking sheet. Sprinkle with a pinch of sea salt and a grind of fresh black pepper.
Bake in the oven for 15 minutes, until the cheese has melted and is bubbling, and serve immediately.

eggplant-mozzarella-and-saffron-rice-bak.name: Eggplant, Mozzarella, And Saffron Rice Bake
instructions: Arrange racks in top and bottom thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion; cook, stirring often, until softened, about 8 minutes. Add rice; cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes. Stir in saffron, then wine. Cook until wine reduces slightly, about 1 minute. Add broth; season with salt. Cover and cook over medium heat until rice is very al dente and still crunchy, about 6 minutes; remove pan from heat.

Meanwhile, divide eggplant between two rimmed baking sheets, overlapping slightly to fit. Drizzle 1 cup oil over; season with salt and pepper. Bake, turning eggplant and rotating sheets halfway through, until tender and golden brown, 20–25 minutes.
Cover the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch baking dish with 1 cup tomato sauce. Sprinkle 1/3 of mozzarella over, then 1/3 of Parmesan.

Cover with a layer of eggplant rounds, overlapping so no sauce is visible beneath them. Add saffron rice, spreading out in an even layer. Sprinkle over another 1/3 each of mozzarella and Parmesan, then 1/2 of the remaining tomato sauce and another layer of eggplant. Top with remaining tomato sauce and remaining mozzarella and Parmesan. Cover dish with foil; transfer to a foil-lined baking sheet.
Bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese is melted, about 15 minutes. Uncover dish and bake until golden on top, about 20 minutes longer. Let stand for at least 10 minutes to set before serving.

eggplant-red-pepper-and-fontina-panini-w.name: Eggplant, Red Pepper, And Fontina Panini With Spinach Salad

ingredients.item: -inch-thick slices olive bread or country white bread

instructions: Brush panini press, panini pan, or grill rack with oil; heat press, pan, or barbecue (medium-high heat). Brush eggplant rounds and pepper strips with oil; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Working in batches, grill eggplant until tender, turning occasionally, about 6 minutes. Working in batches, grill bell peppers until tender, turning occasionally and flattening with back of spatula for even cooking, about 6 minutes. Place 8 eggplant rounds and 8 bell pepper strips on rimmed baking sheet. Place remaining eggplant and peppers on work surface and slice thinly; reserve for salad.

Place 4 bread slices on work surface. Divide half of Fontina cheese among bread slices; top each with 2 eggplant rounds, 2 tablespoons Parmesan cheese, 1 tablespoon basil, and 1 teaspoon oregano. Top each with 2 bell pepper strips. Arrange remaining Fontina cheese atop peppers, then top with remaining bread slices, pressing to compact. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover with plastic and let stand at room temperature.

Heat panini press, panini pan, or barbecue (medium-high heat). Brush press or pan with oil (if using barbecue, lightly brush bread slices with oil). Place sandwiches in press or pan or on grill; cover and cook until bread is golden and cheese is melted, about 5 minutes per side.

Meanwhile, whisk 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil and vinegar in large bowl; season to taste with salt and pepper. Add spinach, thinly sliced eggplant, and thinly sliced peppers; toss to coat. Season salad to taste with salt and pepper.
Cut sandwiches in half. Serve with spinach salad.

eggplant-roasted-pepper-and-chicken-pita.name: Eggplant, Roasted Pepper And Chicken Pitas
instructions: Sprinkle sliced eggplant with salt and allow to drain in a colander for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, preheat a grill for medium-high heat (see Cook's Note).
Pound chicken breasts between two sheets of plastic wrap to a thickness of 1/4-inch. Dredge with flour, shake off excess, dip into beaten egg, then press into seasoned bread crumbs to coat.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken breasts and cook until golden brown. Set aside.
Wipe eggplant dry with a paper towel. If grilling, brush slices with remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil. Grill until tender and well marked.

Crush garlic with a mortar and pestle with a pinch of salt. Whisk together garlic, red wine vinegar, and extra-virgin olive oil. Slice grilled eggplant into strips and toss with roasted peppers and balsamic dressing; season to taste with salt and pepper.
To assemble, heat pita breads on the grill until hot and marked. Slice chicken into strips and place into warm pitas along with marinated eggplant and red peppers.

eggplants-for-fasting-argiro.name: Eggplants For Fasting
instructions: Πλένουμε και κόβουμε τις μελιτζάνες στη μέση κατά μήκος.
Με μαχαίρι χαράζουμε σταυρωτά τη σάρκα και τις αραδιάζουμε σε λαμαρίνα.
Με πινέλο τις αλείφουμε με ελαιόλαδο και τις πασπαλίζουμε με αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Τις ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200ºC για περίπου 30 λεπτά να μαλακώσουν.

eggplants-in-a-north-south-sauce.name: Eggplants In A North-south Sauce

ingredients.item: Skinned urad dal or yellow split peas

ingredients.prep: cut crossways into 1-inch segments, or "baby" Italian eggplants cut in half lengthways and then crossways

instructions: Pour the oil into a very large frying pan and set over medium-high heat. When hot, put in the asafetida and the urad dal. As soon as the dal turns a shade darker, add the mustard, cumin, nigella, and fennel seeds, in that order. When the mustard seeds begin to pop, a matter of seconds, add the onions. Stir and fry for a minute. Add the garlic and the eggplant. Stir and fry for 4-5 minutes or until the onions are a bit browned. Add the grated tomatoes, stock, salt, and cayenne. Stir to mix and bring to a boil. Cover, turn heat to low, and cook about 20 minutes or until the eggplants are tender, stirring now and then.

eggplants-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Eggplants In The Oven
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο.
Σοτάρουμε τις σπασμένες σκελίδες σκόρδο για 1-2′.
Προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες, ζουλώντας τις με τα χέρια.
Τρίβουμε πιπέρι και σιγοβράζουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά για 10-15′.
Προς το τέλος του βρασμού, προσθέτουμε τον βασιλικό.

eggplants-in-the-oven-with-feta-cheese-a.name: Eggplants In The Oven With Feta Cheese
instructions: Ξεκινάμε, πλένοντας πρώτα και σκουπίζοντας τις μελιτζάνες.
Τις κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες πάχους 1,5 εκατοστού.
Αραδιάζουμε τις μελιτζάνες σε 2 ταψιά στρωμένα με λαδόκολλα.
Ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο.
Ψήνουμε στους 200 ºC για 10-15′ να μαλακώσουν ελαφρά.

eggplants-in-the-oven-without-frying-arg.name: Eggplants In The Oven Without Frying
instructions: Στρώνουμε αντικολλητικό χαρτί σε μικρό ταψί.
Πλένουμε τις μελιτζάνες και τις κόβουμε κατά μήκος  στα δυο.
Με τη μύτη του μαχαιριού χαράζουμε ελαφρά την κομμένη επιφάνεια της  σε ρόμβους σταυρωτά.
Τις ακουμπάμε στο ταψί και αλείφουμε με πινέλο  ελαιόλαδο στην κομμένη σάρκα τους.
Αλατίζουμε και πασπαλίζουμε με θυμάρι και ρίγανη.
Τις ψήνουμε  στο φούρνο για περίπου 30′ μέχρι να μαλακώσουν και να ροδίσουν.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Σε ένα μπολ, ανακατεύουμε το γιαούρτι, το σκόρδο, το λάδι και το αλάτι με ένα κουτάλι.
Ισομοιράζουμε τη σάλτσα  και γαρνίρουμε με ρόδι και μαϊντανό.
Περιχύστε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο πριν σερβίρετε.

eggplants-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Eggplants In The Pot
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες και αφού τις πλύνουμε, τις κόβουμε σε χοντρά κομμάτια.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα το μισό ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι για λίγα λεπτά μέχρι να γίνει διάφανο.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο, τον πελτέ και τις πατάτες.
Τις αφήνουμε να σιγοψηθούν για λίγα λεπτά και να λαδωθούν καλά.
Προσθέτουμε τις τριμμένες ντομάτες και συμπληρώνουμε νερό τόσο, όσο να καλυφθούν τα υλικά.
Ρίχνουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Σκεπάζουμε με καπάκι και σιγοβράζουμε για περίπου 35΄ μέχρι να μισομαλακώσουν οι πατάτες.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 200°C στον αέρα.
Κόβουμε τις μελιτζάνες σε χοντρά κομμάτια.
Τις αραδιάζουμε σε ταψί και τις ραντίζουμε με ελάχιστο ελαιόλαδο.
Τις ψήνουμε σε δυνατό φούρνο για 15΄ να καψαλιστούν.
Όταν μισομαλακώσουν οι πατάτες, προσθέτουμε στην κατσαρόλα τις ψημένες μελιτζάνες και το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο.
Σιγοβράζουμε για επιπλέον 15′.
Τέλος πασπαλίζουμε με το μαϊντανό.
Το φαγητό πρέπει να μείνει σχεδόν με το λάδι του.
Δεν το ανακατεύουμε γιατί λιώνουν τα υλικά.
Σερβίρεται απαραιτήτως με φρέσκο τυρί και είναι υπέροχο!

eggplants-stuffed-with-couscous-and-rais.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Couscous And Raisins: Healthy Recipe
eggplants-stuffed-with-couscous-and-rais.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de cuscús y pasas: receta saludable
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 °C (177°C). Corta las berenjenas por la mitad a lo largo y saca la pulpa con cuidado, dejando un borde de aproximadamente 1 cm. Pica la pulpa retirada y reserva.
En una cacerola, llevar el gua a ebullición. Retira del fuego y añade el cuscús. Cubre y deja reposar durante 5 minutos. Luego, esponja con un tenedor en forma envolvente.

En una sartén grande, calienta el aceite de oliva a fuego medio. Añade la cebolla y el ajo, y cocina hasta que estén dorados. Agrega el pimiento rojo y la pulpa de berenjena reservada. Cocina hasta que los vegetales estén tiernos, aproximadamente 5-7 minutos.
Incorpora las pasas, el cuscús cocido, el comino, el pimentón, sal y pimienta. Mezcla bien y cocina por 2-3 minutos adicionales.
Coloca las mitades de berenjena en una bandeja para hornear y rellena generosamente con la mezcla de cuscús.
Cubre la bandeja con papel aluminio y hornea durante 25-30 minutos. Retira el papel aluminio en los últimos 10 minutos para dorar la parte superior.
Decora con perejil fresco picado y, si se desea, espolvorea queso feta desmenuzado antes de servir.

eggplants-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-re.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Fish: A Healthy Recipe
eggplants-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-re.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de pescado: una receta saludable

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de queso rallado ((opcional, para gratinar))

instructions: Lava bien las berenjenas y córtalas por la mitad, a lo largo. Con una cuchara, vacía la pulpa de cada mitad, dejando aproximadamente un borde de 1 cm para que mantengan su forma. Reserva la pulpa y coloca las mitades de berenjena en una bandeja para horno.
Precalienta el horno a 180 °C. Rocía las mitades de berenjena con un poco de aceite de oliva, sal y pimienta. Hornea durante 10 minutos para que se ablanden un poco.

En una sartén grande, calienta el aceite de oliva a fuego medio. Sofríe la cebolla, el ajo y el pimiento rojo hasta que estén tiernos y fragantes. Agrega el tomate y la pulpa de la berenjena picada, y cocina hasta que el agua se haya evaporado.
Corta el pescado en trozos pequeños y agrégalo a la mezcla de vegetales en la sartén. Cocina durante 5-7 minutos, hasta que el pescado esté cocido. Añade sal, pimienta y perejil fresco picado.

Retira las berenjenas del horno y rellénalas con la mezcla de pescado y vegetales. Espolvorea con queso rallado si lo deseas. Hornea nuevamente durante 15-20 minutos, hasta que el queso esté dorado y burbujeante.
Deja reposar unos minutos antes de servir. Puedes decorarlas con un poco más de perejil fresco para darles un toque de color.

eggplants-stuffed-with-minced-meat-with-.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Minced Meat With Bechamel ( Recipe)
eggplants-stuffed-with-minced-meat-with-.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de carne picada con bechamel (receta FÁCIL)

ingredients.item: 60 ml de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Precalentamos el horno a 180ºC, calor arriba y abajo. Partimos las berenjenas por la mitad, hacemos unos cortes en la carne de la berenjena, añadimos un poquito de sal y disponemos en la bandeja del horno con la piel hacia bajo. Llevamos al horno 30 minutos. Retiramos las berenjenas del horno y con cuidado de no quemarnos vamos quitando la carne de la berenjena (hay que ir con cuidado de no romper la piel de la berenjena porque la vamos a utilizar para rellenarla).

Picamos la cebolla en trocitos muy pequeños, salteamos en una sartén con un poquito de aceite de oliva. Cuando la cebolla empiece a estar tierna, añadimos la zanahoria picada en trocitos muy pequeños, dejamos pochar. Añadimos la carne picada a la sartén y con una cuchara vamos desmenuzando para que no queden trozos grandes de carne picada, dejamos cocinar durante 8 minutos más. Picamos la carne de la berenjena en trocitos pequeños y añadimos junto la carne picada, dejamos cocinar durante 5 minutos más. Añadimos el tomate frito, una pizca de pimienta y dejamos cocinar 3 minutos más.

En un cazo vamos calentando la leche, en una cazuela añadimos el aceite y dejamos que vaya cogiendo temperatura, incorporamos la harina y freímos en el aceite sin llegar a dorarla. Incorporamos la leche poquito a poco (estará calentita) con unas varillas sin dejar de remover para evitar los grumos. Cocinamos unos 15 minutos hasta que la bechamel empiece a espesar. Añade un poquito de sal y una pizca de nuez moscada
Rellena las berenjenas con el relleno de carne Sobre el relleno echa un par de cucharadas de bechamel y sobre la bechamel queso rallado.
Cocinamos a 180ºC calor arriba, hasta que se gratine el queso.

eggplants-stuffed-with-quinoa-and-tofu-v.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Quinoa And Tofu: Vegan And Recipe
eggplants-stuffed-with-quinoa-and-tofu-v.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de quinoa y tofu: receta vegana y fácil
instructions: Lava las berenjenas y córtalas por la mitad longitudinalmente. Con una cuchara, retira la pulpa dejando un borde de aproximadamente 1 cm. Reserva la pulpa. Coloca las berenjenas en una bandeja de horno, pincela con aceite de oliva y hornea a 180°C durante 20 minutos, hasta que estén tiernas.

Mientras tanto, enjuaga la quinoa y cuécela en una olla con 2 tazas de agua y una pizca de sal. Lleva a ebullición, reduce el fuego y cocina a fuego lento durante 15 minutos o hasta que el agua se absorba por completo. Reserva.
Pica finamente la cebolla, el ajo, la zanahoria, el pimiento y la pulpa de berenjena que retiraste antes.

En una sartén grande, calienta 2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva y sofríe la cebolla y el ajo durante 2-3 minutos. Agrega la zanahoria, el pimiento y la pulpa de berenjena. Cocina a fuego medio durante 5-7 minutos, removiendo con frecuencia.

Desmenuza el tofu con las manos y agrégalo a la sartén junto con la quinoa cocida. Añade la salsa de soja, el comino, el pimentón, la pimienta negra y sal al gusto. Cocina durante 5 minutos más, mezclando bien todos los ingredientes. Si la mezcla está seca, añade un poco de caldo de verduras para darle jugosidad.
Retira las berenjenas del horno y rellénalas generosamente con la mezcla de quinoa y tofu. Devuélvelas al horno y hornea durante 10 minutos adicionales para que los sabores se integren.
Retira del horno y decora con perejil fresco picado.

eggplants-stuffed-with-tuna-step-by-step.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Tuna Step By Step
eggplants-stuffed-with-tuna-step-by-step.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de atún paso a paso
instructions: Tomas las berenjenas, lávalas y córtalas a la mitad. Con la ayuda de un cuchillo, retira gran parte de la pulpa. Procede a colocarle sal, tanto al caparazón de la berenjena y el relleno. Esto evitará que se oxiden y ayudará a que desprenda su sabor amargo.

Pon a calentar un sartén con el aceite de oliva y agrégale la cebolla y el ajo en cuadritos o corte "brunoise". Saltéalas hasta que se doren. Quita el exceso de líquido que desprendió la pulpa de la berenjena y añade al sartén. Condimenta con la sal y la pimienta al gusto. Tapa y déjalo por 5 minutos.
En este punto, agrega los tomates maduros cortados en cubos pequeños y el atún en lata. Mezcla y deja cocinar por 3 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, verterás la pasta de tomate, el orégano y la pizca del azúcar. Mezcla y termina de cocinar por 3 minutos. Apaga y deja reposar.
Precalienta el horno a 180 grados centígrados.
Tomamos nuestros caparazones de berenjenas y lo rellenamos con el atún. Trata de cubrir todo. Colócalas en una bandeja para hornearlas.
Antes de meterlas en el horno, esparce el queso parmesano por toda la superficie de nuestras berenjenas para que gratinen y se doren.
Introdúcelas en el horno y déjalas por 15 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, ya deben estar listas para degustar.
¡Disfruta!

eggplants-stuffed-with-vegetables-telecu.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Vegetables
instructions: Lave as beringelas, corte-as ao meio, retire-lhes o interior e coloque tudo numa tigela. Cubra com água fria, tempere com sal e deixe repousar durante cerca de 15 minutos. Após esse tempo, escorra bem e reserve.

Corte o alho-francês em rodelas finas; corte a curgete em cubos pequenos; limpe o pimento de sementes e corte-o em tiras ou pedaços pequenos; pique o miolo das beringelas; lave os tomates-cereja; descasque e pique os alhos.
Disponha as beringelas num tabuleiro, regue-as com o fio de azeite e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, até ficarem macias.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e os alhos picados e deixe refogar. Junte depois todos os legumes que preparou anteriormente e deixe saltear bem. Retire do lume, tempere com sal, pimenta e cebolinho e envolva.
Recheie as beringelas com a mistura anterior e leve novamente ao forno, até ficarem quentes e douradinhas. Sirva decoradas com mais cebolinho.
SUGERE QUEM SABE
Se gostar, polvilhe o recheio com um pouco de queijo ralado antes de levar as beringelas ao forno.

eggplants-stuffed-with-vegetables-baked-.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Vegetables, Baked Or In The Air Fryer
eggplants-stuffed-with-vegetables-baked-.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de verduras, al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Hierbas frescas al gusto (perejil o albahaca)

instructions: Empieza lavando bien las 2 berenjenas medianas, córtalas por la mitad a lo largo y haz unos cortes en la pulpa con un cuchillo, sin llegar a atravesar la piel.
Colócalas en una bandeja de horno, añade un chorrito de aceite de oliva por encima y una pizca de sal, y hornéalas a 190 ºC durante 25–30 minutos, hasta que la pulpa esté tierna.
Mientras se hacen las berenjenas, lava y corta en dados pequeños 1 pimiento rojo y 1 pimiento amarillo.
Pela y pica fina 1 cebolla pequeña y 1 diente de ajo.
Lava los 2 tomates maduros y pícalos también en dados pequeños.

Cuando las berenjenas estén listas, sácalas del horno y deja que templen un poco. Con una cuchara, retira con cuidado la pulpa, dejando un poco de borde para que luego aguante bien el relleno. Pícala y resérvala.

Pon una sartén amplia a fuego medio y añade las 3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva. Incorpora la cebolla y el ajo con una pizca de sal y cocina durante 6–8 minutos, hasta que estén blandos y ligeramente dorados.
Añade los pimientos y cocina 5–6 minutos más, removiendo de vez en cuando.

Incorpora los tomates picados y la pulpa de berenjena reservada. Salpimenta al gusto y cocina todo junto durante 10–12 minutos, hasta que el relleno esté bien pochado y sin exceso de líquido.Apaga el fuego y añade las hierbas frescas picadas.

Rellena las mitades de berenjena con la mezcla de verduras, colócalas de nuevo en la bandeja y hornéalas a 190 ºC durante 10–12 minutos más, solo para que se integren los sabores. Añade más hierbas frescas picadas y sírvelas calientes o templadas.

eggplants-with-feta-cheese-in-the-air-fr.name: Eggplants With Feta Cheese In The Air Fryer
eggplants-with-feta-cheese-in-the-air-fr.original_name: Μελιτζάνες με φέτα στο air fryer
instructions: Πλένουμε τις μελιτζάνες , τις στεγνώνουμε και τις κόβουμε στη μέση κρατώντας το κοτσάνι ενωμένο με το σώμα τους.
Χαράζουμε σταυρωτά τη σάρκα τους. Τις πασπαλίζουμε με αλάτι και τις ψεκάζουμε ολόγυρα με ελαιόλαδο.
Προθερμαίνουμε το air fryer στους 180°C για 3 λεπτά.
Τοποθετούμε τις μελιτζάνες στο καλάθι της συσκευής και τις ψήνουμε για 20 λεπτά, να μαλακώσουν.
Στο μεταξύ ετοιμάζουμε τη γέμιση. Ζεσταίνουμε σε ένα τηγάνι το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι με λίγο αλάτι για 7-8 λεπτά, να αρχίσει να καραμελώνει.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο και σοτάρουμε για 1 λεπτό.
Ρίχνουμε τα ντοματίνια και σοτάρουμε τα υλικά για 2-3 λεπτά σε δυνατή φωτιά.
Σβήνουμε με το βαλσαμικό ξίδι, αλατοπιπερώνουμε και αποσύρουμε το μείγμα από την εστία.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε το μαϊντανό και τη ρίγανη και ανακατεύουμε.
Ελέγχουμε αν έχει μαλακώσει καλά η ψίχα της μελιτζάνας και την ανακατεύουμε με το κουτάλι.
Στη συνέχεια, την πιέζουμε να σχηματιστεί ένα βαθούλωμα σαν θήκη το οποίο γεμίζουμε με το μείγμα της γέμισης. Ομοίως γεμίζουμε και τις υπόλοιπες μελιτζάνες.
Ψήνουμε τις μελιτζάνες για 10 λεπτά ακόμα, να καραμελώσουν τα υλικά.
Τις πασπαλίζουμε με λίγη τριμμένη φέτα και καρύδι, ψεκάζουμε με ελαιόλαδο και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για 2 λεπτά ακόμα

eggplants-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Eggplants With Minced Meat
instructions: Κόβουμε τις μελιτζάνες σε λεπτές φέτες και τις αραδιάζουμε σε 2 λαμαρίνες.
Τις ραντίζουμε με ελαιόλαδο και βαλσαμικό, τις αλατίζουμε και προσθέτουμε το θυμάρι.
Ψήνουμε στους 200°C για 15-20 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν.

eggplants-with-sauce-argiro.name: Eggplants With Sauce

ingredients.item: 1μέτριο κόκκινο ξερό κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε φέτες
1μέτριο κόκκινο ξερό κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε φέτες

instructions: Πλένουμε, καθαρίζουμε τις μελιτζάνες από το κοτσάνι και τις κόβουμε σε φέτες.
Σε ένα μπολ με πολύ νερό, βάζουμε τις μελιτζάνες για 10 λεπτά.
Τις στύβουμε και τις σκουπίζουμε.
Τηγανίζουμε τις μελιτζάνες σε μέτρια φωτιά να μαλακώσουν και τις αφήνουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε βαθύ τηγάνι 2-3 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι για λίγα λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο και ανακατεύουμε.
Ρίχνουμε τον πελτέ και τη ζάχαρη και τον τρίβουμε στη βάση του τηγανιού.
Προσθέτουμε τις ψιλοκομμένες ντομάτες.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε και βράζουμε για 10′ περίπου μέχρι να πυκνώσει η σάλτσα.
Πασπαλίζουμε με τα μυρωδικά και ανακατεύουμε.
Σε μία πιατέλα στήνουμε τις μελιτζάνες, τη μία πάνω από την άλλη.
Ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά για τη σάλτσα τυριού.
Ακουμπάμε την πυκνή σάλτσα ντομάτας πάνω από τις μελιτζάνες και τέλος αφήνουμε κουταλιές από τη σάλτσα τυριού.
Πασπαλίζουμε με μυρωδικά.
Σερβίρεται σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου ή κρύο.

eggs-benedict-lezzet.name: Eggs Benedict

ingredients.item: Bir tutam ince çekilmiş deniz tuzu

instructions: 1. Kahvaltı sofralarınız için değişik bir yumurta tarifi denemek isteyenler için egg benedict.
4. Derin bir tencerede suyu kaynatmadan ısıtın ve yumurta sarılarını benmariusulü pişirin.
5.  Sade yağ elde etmek için; tereyağını küçük bir sos tenceresine alın.
6.  Kısık ateşte yağı yakmadan ve çok fazla köpürmesine izin vermeden eritin.
7.  Üzerine çıkan süt köpüklerini bir kaşık yardımıyla temizleyin.
8. Eritilmiş tereyağını süzgeçten geçirip ılık halde bekletin.
9.  Dikkatlice ayrılmış yumurta sarıları, beyaz şarap sirkesi ve soğuk suyu cam kaseye alın.
10.  Bir el çırpıcısı yardımıyla karıştırma işlemini başlatın ve yumurta sarılarını sürekli aynı yöne doğru karıştırmaya özen gösterin.
11.  Isısı yaklaşık 50 derece civarında olan sıcak suyun üzerine kaseyi oturtun ve çırpma işlemini burada sürdürün.
12.  2-3 dakika sonunda yumurta sarıları krema kıvamını aldığında kaseyi mutfak tezgahı üzerine alın.
13. Çırpılmış yumurta sarılarını ılınması için kısa bir süre bekletip, elde ettiğiniz sade yağı sicim gibi akıtarak yumurta sarılarına yedirin.
14.  Bunun için karıştırma işlemini ara vermeden sürdürün.
15.  Sos tam anlamıyla ince dokulu bir krema halini aldığında ince çekilmiş deniz tuzu ve arzuya göre taze çekilmiş tane karabiberi katın.
16. Hafif kaynayan suya sirke ve tuz ekleyin, kaşıkla karıştırarak bir akım yaratın ve içine yumurtaları tek tek kırın.
17.  4 dakika pişen yumurtaları bir kevgir yardımıyla kağıt havlunun üzerine alın.
18.  Ekşi maya ekmeğini fırında, üzerine hafif tereyağı sürerek kızartın.
19.  Ispanakları kızgın tavada soteleyin, yarım limon kabuğu rendeleyin ve tuz ile tatlandırın.
20. Sırası ile kızartılmış ekşi maya ekmek, sote ıspanak, poşe yumurta ve Hollandez sosu üst üste koyarak servis yapın.

eggs-benedict-florentine.name: Eggs Benedict Florentine

ingredients.item: Deli thin smoked ham-water added om

instructions: Prepare Hollandaise: Whisk together egg yolks, lemon juice, and pepper in a pan over low heat. Add 1/2 of the butter and continue to whisk until the butter is melted and incorporated. Add remaining butter and salt and whisk until melted. Sprinkle in paprika. Turn heat off and cover with a lid to keep warm.

Fill a large saucepan with 5 to 8 inches of water and bring to a gentle simmer. Add vinegar and reduce heat to low. Carefully break eggs into the simmering water and cook until whites are firm and the yolks have thickened but are not hard, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove the eggs from the water with a slotted spoon, dab on a kitchen towel to remove excess water, and place onto a warm plate.

While the eggs are poaching heat ham in a skillet over medium-high heat until warm, 2 to 3 minutes, microwave spinach sprinkled with a little water on a plate for 30 seconds, and toast English muffins.
Spread butter on toasted muffins. Top each half with a slice of ham, some spinach, and a poached egg. Drizzle with a healthy helping of Hollandaise and serve immediately.

eggs-benedict-for-a-crowd.name: Eggs Benedict For A Crowd
instructions: Fill a large pot three-quarters full with water and bring to a bare simmer. Set up a large bowl of ice water and place near stove.

Working one at a time, crack egg into a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl and shake gently to allow the more liquid part of egg white to pass through. Gently transfer egg to a medium bowl (eggs are more resilient than you think, but be careful not to break the protective ring of egg white surrounding yolk). This step might sound insane, but it eliminates the thin tentacle-like strands of egg whites that form when the egg hits the hot water.

Once you have 6 strained eggs in bowl, gently position bowl over pot of simmering water and, one at a time, slip each egg into pot. Cook eggs, gently encouraging each to rotate with a slotted spoon so they cook evenly, until whites are set and yolks are still runny, 3 minutes. Transfer to ice bath and let cool (you’ll reheat them later on).
Skim off and discard any foam or bits of egg white in pot. Return water to a bare simmer. Repeat poaching process with remaining 6 eggs.
Do Ahead: Eggs can be poached 1 day ahead. Store in ice bath in fridge.
Heat butter in a medium saucepan over low until melted. Set aside ¼ cup melted butter for assembly. Transfer remaining butter to a small liquid measuring cup.

Fill a blender pitcher with very hot water and let sit 3 minutes to warm blender (this will prevent the sauce from separating). Drain pitcher; dry well. Blend egg yolks and lemon juice in blender just to combine. With the motor running, slowly stream in melted butter in liquid measuring cup until hollandaise is thickened, glossy, and pale yellow. Transfer to a medium bowl; stir in salt and cayenne. Taste and adjust seasoning, if needed (it will need a fair amount of salt to balance the acidity and fat). If sauce seems too thick, thin with 1–2 Tbsp. warm water and adjust seasoning as needed.

Do Ahead: Hollandaise can be made 1 hour ahead. Transfer to a heatproof container, cover tightly with plastic wrap, and set in a small saucepan of very hot water to keep warm. Whisk until smooth before serving.
Preheat oven to 450°. Arrange English muffins, cut side up, on a sheet tray. Brush with reserved ¼ cup melted butter. Toast muffins until golden brown around edges, 6–8 minutes.
Divide ham among muffins. Return sheet tray to oven and toast until ham is warmed through, about 1 minute. Transfer muffins to a large platter.

To reheat eggs, bring a large pot of water to a bare simmer. Remove each egg from ice bath and lower into pot, then turn off heat. Cook eggs 1 minute, then gently transfer to a paper towel-lined sheet tray to drain.
Place 1 poached egg atop ham. Season eggs with salt and black pepper. Spoon hollandaise sauce over. Top with chives and cayenne.

eggs-benedict-recipe-lezzet.name: Eggs Benedict Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 adet i̇ngiliz muffin (toplam ~120 g) (yoksa küçük yuvarlak ekmek)
1 yemek kaşığı üzüm ya da elma sirkesi
Bir tutam beyaz biber veya karabiber
İnce kıyılmış frenk soğanı, dereotu veya taze soğan

instructions: 1. Önce poşe yumurtalar için geniş bir tencereye su koyun ve kaynama noktasına gelene kadar ısıtın.
2.  Su hafif hafif fokurdamaya başladığında içine sirkeyi ekleyin.
3.  Yumurtaları küçük bir kaseye kırın.
4.  Suda kaşıkla hafif bir girdap oluşturup yumurtaları tek tek dikkatlice suya bırakın.
5.  Aklar toparlanıp sarılar akışkan kalacak şekilde yaklaşık 3 dakika pişirin.
6.  Delikli kaşıkla sudan alıp kenara alın.
7. Bu sırada hollandez sosu hazırlayın.
8.  Yumurta sarılarını ve limon suyunu ısıya dayanıklı bir kaba alın.
9.  Kabı, altı kaynar su dolu bir tencerenin üzerine oturtun.
10.  Sürekli çırparak yumurta sarılarını hafifçe ısıtın.
11.  Eritilmiş ve ılık tereyağını ince bir akış halinde, azar azar ekleyerek çırpmaya devam edin.
12.  Sos koyu, parlak ve akışkan bir kıvam aldığında tuz ve biberle tatlandırın.
13. İngiliz muffinlerini ortadan ikiye kesin.
14.  Bir tavada az tereyağı ile iç yüzeyleri altın rengi olana kadar kızartın.
15.  Üzerlerine jambon, pastırma ya da füme somonu yerleştirin.
16. Kızarmış muffinlerin üzerine poşe yumurtaları yerleştirin.
17.  En son bolca hollandez sos gezdirin.
18.  İsteğe bağlı olarak ince kıyılmış frenk soğanı veya dereotu serpip hemen servis edin.
19.  Afiyet olsun.

eggs-benedict-with-blender-hollandaise.name: Eggs Benedict With Blender Hollandaise
instructions: Make the eggs Benedict: Heat the oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium. Add the prosciutto, and cook until crispy, 2–3 minutes, flipping halfway through. Transfer the prosciutto to a paper towel–lined plate, and set aside.

Drain the drippings from the skillet, and add the butter. Add the English muffins, cut side down, and cook over medium until golden and crisp, 2–3 minutes. Remove from heat. Remove the English muffins from the skillet, and set aside.

Make the blender hollandaise: Place the egg yolks, vinegar, hot sauce, and salt in a small blender. Process for about 20 seconds, or until evenly combined and slightly thickened. With the blender running on low speed, slowly stream in the hot melted butter, and process until thick and glossy, 2–3 minutes. Remove from heat. The hollandaise should be thick enough to coat the back of a spoon but still drip off. If the hollandaise is too thick, slowly blend in 1 tablespoon hot water until you reach the desired consistency. Taste and add more salt to taste.

Return to the eggs Benedict: Fill a large, wide saucepan with water to a depth of 6 inches. Bring to a gentle simmer over medium-high heat. Add a pinch of salt. Working with 1 egg at a time, crack each egg into a fine-mesh strainer set over a bowl to let the watery parts of the whites strain out. Transfer each yolk to a small ramekin. Discard the strained watery whites.

Using a large slotted spoon, stir the simmering water to create a gentle vortex, then slide in 1 of the eggs. Cook for 2–3 minutes, until the whites are set and the yolk is still soft. Lift the egg from the water using the slotted spoon, and carefully set it on paper towels to drain. Repeat the process with the remaining 3 eggs.

Arrange the toasted muffins on 2 plates. Top the muffin halves evenly with the crispy prosciutto, poached eggs, and a generous spoonful of hollandaise. Garnish with chives and pepper. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

eggs-caviar.name: Eggs Caviar

ingredients.item: Grams of your favorite caviar or roe

instructions: Gently whip the eggs with a fork.

Heat a saucepan over medium heat, then add the Cognac and butter (they should sizzle/simmer immediately). Add the eggs and whisk constantly—working on and off the heat in order to develop the curds little by little and prevent the eggs from sticking or otherwise overcooking at the base of the pan—until the eggs begin to resemble a soft scramble. Add 1 tablespoon of the sour cream and stir to incorporate, letting the eggs sputter and pop a few times on the heat. Barely fold in the remaining sour cream (some streaks should still be visible).

Top the buttered toast with plenty of soft scrambled eggs and a heaping spoon of the caviar. Or pour eggs in a bowl and top the whole thing with the caviar, use the toast as a spoon, and knock yourself out.

eggs-en-cocotte.name: Eggs En Cocotte
instructions: Pour water into a large skillet to come ½" up the sides; bring to a simmer over medium heat. Generously grease four 8-oz. ramekins or small heatproof bowls (about 1 tsp. each) with unsalted butter; sprinkle generously with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Divide 4 Tbsp. finely chopped chives among ramekins.

Crack 1 large egg into each ramekin, then transfer ramekins to skillet and cover skillet with a lid. Cook eggs, adjusting heat as needed to maintain a simmer, until whites are set and yolks are still soft, 4–7 minutes. Using tongs, carefully transfer ramekins to plates.
Divide 4 Tbsp. heavy cream (if using) among ramekins; season lightly with more salt and pepper. Serve eggs with warm buttered toast.

eggs-for-dinner.name: Eggs For Dinner

ingredients.prep: toasted sesame seeds, and sliced scallions (for serving)

instructions: Place cucumbers in a small bowl. Add several pinches of salt. Massage cucumbers with your hands, gently at first, then squeezing more firmly as they expel excess water and become more pliable. Pour off any liquid they release.
Stir vinegar and honey in another small bowl until honey is dissolved. Add to cucumbers and toss to coat. Season with salt if needed.

Melt ghee in a small skillet (preferably nonstick) over medium-low heat. Whisk eggs, mirin (if using), ginger, and soy sauce in a medium bowl until eggs are completely smooth and no visible bits of whites remain. Add to skillet and cook, stirring with a rubber spatula, until large wavy curds form and no wet egg remains, about 2 minutes. Taste and season with salt.
Serve eggs on top of rice. Top with pickled cucumbers, sesame seeds, and scallions.
Do Ahead: Cucumbers can be pickled 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

eggs-in-purgatory.name: Eggs In Purgatory

ingredients.item: Flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Heat ¼ cup oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. When it just starts to shimmer, add garlic and season generously with kosher salt and black pepper. Cook, stirring constantly, until garlic is just turning golden around the edges, about 2 minutes. Stir in red pepper flakes, then add tomatoes and cook, tossing occasionally, until tomatoes look plumped and some of the skins start to split, about 2 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium. Cover pan and cook, stirring tomatoes every couple of minutes and lightly smashing them with a wooden spoon to encourage them to release some juices, until mixture is saucy and tomatoes are slightly deflated but still hold some shape, 5–7 minutes.
Meanwhile, strip leaves off Swiss chard stems and tear into bite-sized pieces (or bigger, your call). Reserve stems for your next sauté. Transfer leaves to a medium bowl.

Reduce heat under tomatoes to medium-low (sauce should be bubbling gently). Carefully crack eggs into a large measuring glass, then slip one at a time into tomato mixture, spacing them evenly apart around perimeter of pan. Season eggs with salt and pepper, cover pan, and cook until whites are set but yolks are still runny, 4–6 minutes.
While eggs are cooking, toast bread until crisp. Drizzle with oil, then firmly rub outside of lemon onto toasts to release aromatic oils from peel (you’ll smell it!). Sprinkle toasts with sea salt.
Squeeze about 2 Tbsp. lemon juice over greens, then toss in basil. Drizzle some oil over and season with kosher salt and black pepper. Toss again to combine.

Scoop an egg out of pan, spooning it up from underneath to keep the yolk intact, and transfer to a small shallow bowl. Spoon extra sauce around egg and sprinkle with sea salt. Repeat with remaining eggs. Serve with salad and toasts alongside.
Do Ahead: Tomato mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over medium until simmering before adding eggs.

eggs-in-purgatory-with-artichoke-hearts-.name: Eggs In Purgatory With Artichoke Hearts, Potatoes, And Capers
instructions: Heat olive oil in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onion, chopped thyme, and crushed red pepper; sprinkle lightly with coarse kosher salt and sauté until onion is tender and golden brown, about 10 minutes. Add artichokes and minced garlic; stir 1 minute. Stir in diced tomatoes with juice and bring to boil. Reduce heat; cover skillet and simmer 15 minutes to allow flavors to blend.

Meanwhile, cook potatoes in small saucepan of boiling salted water just until tender, about 8 minutes. Drain. Add potatoes and capers to tomato-artichoke sauce; cover and simmer 5 minutes. Season to taste with coarse salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Tomato-artichoke sauce can be made up to 6 hours ahead. Cool slightly, then cover and refrigerate. Rewarm sauce before continuing.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Pour tomato-artichoke sauce into 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish. Using back of spoon, make 8 evenly spaced indentations in sauce for holding eggs. Crack 1 egg into each indentation in sauce (some of eggs may run together slightly in spots). Bake until egg whites and yolks are softly set, 12 to 16 minutes. Carefully remove baking dish from oven; sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over and serve.

eggs-in-the-oven-in-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Eggs In The Oven In Puff Pastry
eggs-in-the-oven-in-puff-pastry-argiro.original_name: Αυγά μάτια στο φούρνο σε σφολιάτα

ingredients.item: 1μικρό κρεμμύδι σε πολύ λεπτοκομμένες σχεδόν διάφανες φέτες (προαιρετικά)
1μικρό κρεμμύδι σε πολύ λεπτοκομμένες σχεδόν διάφανες φέτες (προαιρετικά)

instructions: Στρώνουμε λαδόκολλα σε ένα ταψί και απλώνουμε ένα φύλλο σφολιάτας επάνω.
Κόβουμε γύρω-γύρω από κάθε φύλλο από μία λωρίδα 2 εκ. (γύρω-γύρω σαν κορνίζα).
Χτυπάμε το αυγό και αλείφουμε όλη την επιφάνεια.
Κολλάμε περιμετρικά τις λωρίδες που κόψαμε, ώστε να σχηματιστεί θήκη.
Πασπαλίζουμε με την παρμεζάνα.
Τρυπάμε όλη την επιφάνεια με πιρούνι και χαράζουμε ρόμβους ή γραμμές στην μπορντούρα με κοφτερό μαχαίρι.
Αλείφουμε γύρω-γύρω την μπορντούρα με αυγό.

Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 200ºC – 220ºC στον αέρα για 12′-15΄, ώσπου να φουσκώσει η σφολιάτα και να ψηθεί το αυγό με το τυρί, αδιαβροχοποιώντας τη σφολιάτα και κρατώντας την τραγανή.
Τη βγάζουμε από το φούρνο.
Χαμηλώνουμε τη θερμοκρασία στους 180ºC.
Στο αυγό που περισσεύει προσθέτουμε την κρέμα, αλατοπίπερο και το κασέρι.
Ανακατεύουμε και τα ρίχνουμε πάνω στη μισοψημένη σφολιάτα.
Απλώνουμε σε μια στρώση, το πολύ λεπτοκομμένο κρεμμύδι.
Κάνουμε έξι φωλιές με ψιλοκομμένο μπέικον, αφήνοντας κενό στη μέση και ρίχνουμε από ένα ολόκληρο αυγό, με προσοχή να μην σπάσει (το αποτέλεσμα είναι αυγό μάτι ολόκληρο).
Πασπαλίζουμε ψιλοκομμένο σχοινόπρασο.

eggs-over.name: Eggs Over

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in an 8-inch nonstick pan over medium heat. Once butter is melted, crack eggs into the pan. Tilt pan to evenly distribute eggs. Cook until whites are no longer translucent, 1 to 2 minutes. Flip eggs by pushing the pan away from you and slightly tossing eggs up and over. Move pan upwards to catch eggs.
Cook on second side until desired doneness, 30 to 45 seconds. Season with salt and pepper.

eggs-over-with-potato-hash.name: Eggs Over With Potato Hash
instructions: {'level': '1', 'description': 'Place bacon in a skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels.'}

{'level': '1', 'description': 'Add ghee to the bacon drippings. Add potato, onion, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper. Cook and stir until potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes, adding kale during the last few minutes. Remove potatoes to a plate and crumble bacon slices over top.'}

{'level': '1', 'description': 'When pan has cooled to low, crack eggs into the pan. Season with remaining salt and pepper. Cook until eggs are almost completely set but not hard, 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Carefully flip eggs and cook until whites are completely set, about 30 second more.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Gently slide eggs on top of the potato hash. Drizzle with truffle oil and serve.'}

eggs-remoulade.name: Eggs Rémoulade

ingredients.item: Finely chopped tender herbs (such as parsley
ingredients.prep: chives, tarragon, and/or dill), plus more for serving

ingredients.item: Hot sauce and/or flaky sea salt

instructions: Pour water into a medium saucepan to come 1" up the sides and bring to a boil. Using a slotted spoon, gently lower eggs into water. Cover pan, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook 10 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool, about 5 minutes.
Peel eggs and slice in half lengthwise. Arrange cut side up on a platter or large plate.
Stir anchovy, mayonnaise, cornichons, lime juice, mustard, capers, and ⅓ cup herbs in a small bowl until well combined. Season rémoulade with salt and pepper.
Spoon ½ Tbsp. rémoulade over each egg half. Top with more herbs, followed by hot sauce and sea salt (if using).

eggs-stuffed-with-russian-salad-an-ideal.name: Eggs Stuffed With Russian Salad, An Ideal Recipe For Summer
eggs-stuffed-with-russian-salad-an-ideal.original_name: Huevos rellenos de ensaladilla rusa, una receta ideal para el verano
instructions: Coloca los huevos en una olla con agua fría y un poco de sal. Lleva el agua a ebullición y deja cocer los huevos durante 10 minutos. Una vez cocidos, retíralos del agua caliente y colócalos en un recipiente con agua fría para detener la cocción. Pela los huevos y córtalos por la mitad a lo largo. Retira las yemas y resérvalas.

En un cazo ponemos a hervir agua con dos cucharaditas de sal Añadimos las patatas enteras y con cáscara, junto con la zanahoria, entera y pelada. Dejamos cocer durante unos 30 minutos, esto depende del tamaño de las patatas. Cuando hayan pasado unos 20 minutos, comprobamos si la patata está cocida pinchando con un tenedor. Retiramos de la cazuela las patatas y la zanahoria, dejamos que templen, pelamos y cortamos en dados.
En otra cazuela o sartén, añadimos una cucharadita de aceite de oliva virgen extra y cocinamos los guisantes con un poquito de sal un par de minutos hasta que están tiernos.
En una fuente grande añadimos las patatas y las zanahorias cortadas en dados. A continuación añadimos las yemas de los huevos.
Incorporamos los guisantes, el atún bien escurrido y la mayonesa casera.
Con una cuchara, rellena las mitades de huevo con la ensaladilla rusa. Coloca los huevos rellenos en un plato grande, listos para servir.
Decora con una cucharadita de mayonesa por encima, algunos guisantes y si quieres perejil. Sirve los huevos rellenos fríos y disfruta.

eggs-stuffed-with-tuna-grandmothers-trad.name: Eggs Stuffed With Tuna, Grandmother's Traditional Recipe
eggs-stuffed-with-tuna-grandmothers-trad.original_name: Huevos rellenos de atún, receta tradicional de la abuela

ingredients.item: Pimientos del piquillo y aceitunas para decorar

instructions: Ponemos los huevos en un cazo con agua fría y una pizca de al. Al principio los moveremos para que la yema se quede en el centro, una vez que el agua comience a hervir los dejamos entre ocho y diez minutos (dependiendo del tamaño de los huevos).
Los sacamos y antes de que se enfríen del todo les quitamos la cáscara.
Los partimos por la mitad y separamos las yemas de las claras
Picamos la cebolla y cocinamos en el microondas a máxima potencia unos 3 o 4 minutos.
Ponemos las yemas en un cuenco, reservamos un par de ellas para luego decorar el plato.
Mezclamos bien. Rellenamos con esta mezcla las claras de huevo.
Una vez los tengamos todos rellenos presentamos, para esto ponemos una base de tomate frito en el plato o o fuente.

Colocamos los huevos y cubrimos con mayonesa por completo Ya sólo nos queda adornar con la yema que habíamos reservado que rallamos, unas aceitunas, unas tiras de pimiento, zanahoria o lo que tengáis en casa.

eggs-to-purgatory-recipe-comedera.name: Eggs To Purgatory Recipe
instructions: Calienta un poco de aceite de oliva en una sartén a fuego medio. Agrega el ajo picado y el pimiento rojo picante (si se desea un toque picante) y cocina hasta que estén fragantes.
Pica los tomates maduros y agrégalos a la sartén y cocina a fuego lento hasta que se forme una salsa espesa y los tomates estén completamente cocidos.
Condimenta la salsa con sal, pimienta y hierbas frescas al gusto.
Haz cuatro huecos pequeños en la salsa con una cuchara y rompe un huevo en cada hueco.
Tapa la sartén y cocina a fuego lento hasta que los huevos estén cocidos a su gusto (aproximadamente de 5 a 7 minutos para huevos escalfados con yema líquida).
Espolvorea queso rallado sobre los huevos al servir, si se desea.

eggs-with-algarve-style-tomato-teleculin.name: Eggs With Algarve-style Tomato

ingredients.item: Sal e picante ou pimenta branca q.b.

instructions: Retire a pele e as sementes aos tomates e corte-os em cubos. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite e o louro, junte as cebolas e os alhos picados e deixe alourar ligeiramente. Adicione o tomate, o açúcar, sal e picante ou pimenta e mexa.
Desfaça o miolo de pão com as mãos, acrescente-o ao refogado, envolva e retifique os temperos.

Parta os ovos, um a um, para uma tigela, coloque-os no tacho e salpique com a salsa picada. Tape, deixe escalfar durante 5 a 7 minutos, depois retire do lume e sirva de imediato, acompanhando com fatias de pão caseiro.

eggs-with-bechamel-in-the-oven-or-in-the.name: Eggs With Bechamel In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
eggs-with-bechamel-in-the-oven-or-in-the.original_name: Huevos con bechamel al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 muslos y contramuslos de pollo (unos 450 g aprox.)
Aceite de oliva virgen extra (2-3 cucharadas)
50 g de harina de trigo (3 cucharadas colmadas)

instructions: Cocemos los huevos en agua con sal durante 10 minutos desde que empiece a hervir.
Los enfriamos en agua fría, los pelamos y los partimos por la mitad a lo largo. Retiramos las yemas y reservamos.
En una sartén ponemos un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra y salteamos la cebolla picada.
Cuando comience a dorarse, añadimos también el pollo troceado y salpimentado. Puedes utilizar también pechuga de pollo,  lo que tengas en casa o lo que más te guste.
Cuando esté cocido picamos el pollo. Le añadimos el tomate frito y la yema cocida.
Rellenamos las claras cocidas con esta mezcla y las colocamos en una fuente apta para horno.

Preparamos la bechamel: en un cazo derretimos la mantequilla, añadimos la harina y la tostamos 1 minuto sin dejar de remover. Vertemos poco a poco la leche caliente sin parar de batir con varillas para evitar grumos. Cocinamos 10 minutos a fuego medio hasta que espese, ajustando de sal y añadiendo una pizca de nuez moscada si nos gusta.
Cubrimos los huevos rellenos con la bechamel, repartiéndola bien por encima. Si queremos, podemos espolvorear un poco de queso rallado.
Gratinamos en el horno a 200 ºC con calor arriba durante 5-7 minutos, hasta que la superficie quede dorada.
eggs-with-bechamel-in-the-oven-or-in-the.category: Cenas rápidas y fáciles, Recetas de comidas caseras fáciles

eggs-with-meatballs-lezzet.name: Eggs With Meatballs
instructions: 1. Geniş bir kapta kıyma, ezilmiş sarımsak, acı biber sosu, Worcestershire sosu, tuz ve karabiberi karıştırın.
2.  Harcı 4 eşit parçaya bölün.
3.  Kıymayı avucunuzun içinde açıp ortasına kabuklarını soyduğunuz bir haşlanmış yumurta yerleştirin.
4.  Elinizi suya batırarak kıymayı yumurtanın etrafına kapatıp yuvarlayarak şekil verin.
5.  Diğer yumurtaları da aynı şekilde hazırlayın ve buzdolabına alıp 15-20 dakika dinlendirin.
6.  Bir yumurtayı küçük bir kapta çırpın.
7.  Un ve ekmek kırıntısını ayrı kaplara alın.
8.  Hazırladığınız köfteleri sırasıyla un, yumurta ve ekmek kırıntısına batırın.
9. Zeytinyağını bir tavaya alıp ısıtın.
10.  Köfteleri tavaya alıp kızartın.
11.  Daha sonra yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine alıp önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
12. Sosu için gerekli olan tüm malzemeyi bir kasede karıştırın.
13.  Köfteleri dilimleyin.
14.  Üzerine sos gezdirerek servis yapın.

eggs-with-pickled-shallot-and-parsley.name: Eggs With Pickled Shallot And Parsley
instructions: Gently lower eggs into a medium pot of boiling water and cook 8 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool.
Meanwhile, combine shallot and lemon juice in a small bowl; let sit 10 minutes.
Drain shallots and toss in a small bowl with parsley; season with salt.
Carefully peel eggs (they’ll be a little wobbly in the center) and slice crosswise ½" thick. Arrange on a platter and top with parsley and shallot mixture.

eggs-with-potatoes-in-a-puff-pastry-cone.name: Eggs With Potatoes In A Puff Pastry Cone
instructions: 1. Milföy hamurlarını ince açın.
2.  Şeritler kesip yağladığınız koni biçimindeki kalıbın etrafına sarın.
3.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün.
4.  Susam ve çörekotu serpip yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 12-15 dakika pişirin.
6.  Patatesli yumurta için rendelediğiniz patatesi tereyağında kavurun.
7.  Üzerine ayrı bir kasede çırptığınız yumurtayı ilave edip tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırın.
8.  Sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
9.  Patatesli yumurtayı milföy külahlarının içine paylaştırın.
10.  Dereotu ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

eggs-with-sausage-lezzet.name: Eggs With Sausage
instructions: 1. Sucuklu yumurta ramazan sofralarımızın vazgeçilmez tadımlık lezzetlerden biridir.
2.  İnce dilimlenmiş 10-15 dilim sucuğu 1 tatlı kaşığı sıvıyağ ilave edilmiş bir tavada kızartın.
3.  2 yumurtayı kırıp çırpmadan ilave edin.
4.  Kapağını kapatmadan 1-2 dakika pişirin.
5.  Ateşten alıp 1 tutam tuz ve istediğiniz baharatla tatlandırın.
6.  Sıcak servis yapın.

eggs-with-spinach-lezzet.name: Eggs With Spinach
instructions: 1. Ispanakları yıkayıp, suyunu süzdürdükten sonra irice doğrayın.
2.  Soğanı yarım ay şeklide doğrayın.
3.  Tereyağını eritip soğanı kavurun.
4.  Ispanaklar, tuz ve bulguru ekleyin.
5.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
6.  Kısık ateşte 10 dakika pişirin.
7.  Ispanağın üzerinde yumurtaları kıracağınız boşluklar açın.
8.  Yumurtaları tek tek kırıp bu boşluklara yerleştirin.
9.  Baharatları serpin.
10.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatıp birkaç dakika pişirin.
11.  Sıcak servis yapın.

eggs-with-tomato-argiro.name: Eggs With Tomato

ingredients.item: 1/2κόκκινη και 1/2 πράσινη πιπεριά ψιλοκομμένες σε καρέ
5ώριμες μεγάλες και σφιχτές ντομάτες ψιλοκομμένες ή 1½ συσκευασία ολόκληρες αποφλοιωμένες ντομάτες
2πολύ μικρά φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια (τα φύλλα τους μόνο ψιλοκομμένα)
1/2κόκκινη και 1/2 πράσινη πιπεριά ψιλοκομμένες σε καρέ
5ώριμες μεγάλες και σφιχτές ντομάτες ψιλοκομμένες ή 1½ συσκευασία ολόκληρες αποφλοιωμένες ντομάτες
2πολύ μικρά φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια (τα φύλλα τους μόνο ψιλοκομμένα)

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε το λάδι σε μεγάλο τηγάνι.
Σοτάρουμε το ξερό κρεμμύδι για 3 λεπτά, προσθέτουμε τις πιπεριές και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 3 λεπτά.
Στη συνέχεια ρίχνουμε τη ντομάτα και τον πελτέ και σιγοβράζουμε για 8-10 λεπτά.
Ρίχνουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι και προσθέτουμε την πάπρικα και τη ζάχαρη.
Προαιρετικά προσθέτουμε πιπέρι καγιέν ή λίγο μπούκοβο.
Αν θέλουμε σε αυτό το σημείο προσθέτουμε λίγα τρίμματα φέτας.
Σπάμε τα αυγά ένα-ένα μέσα σε ένα μπολ.
Στη συνέχεια τα ρίχνουμε μέσα στο τηγάνι.
Αφήνουμε τα αυγά να σιγοβράσουν μέσα στην υπέροχη σάλτσα για λίγα λεπτά.
Ανάλογα βέβαια αν προτιμάτε τον κρόκο μελάτο ή σφιχτό παρατείνετε ή μειώνετε τον χρόνο μαγειρέματος.
Τέλος πασπαλίζουμε με τα ψιλοκομμένα τρυφερά φύλλα (πράσινα) των φρέσκων κρεμμυδιών.
Σερβίρουμε με ψωμί και φέτα για ολοκληρωμένη απόλαυση!

eggs-with-tomatoes-and-red-pepper-lezzet.name: Eggs With Tomatoes And Red Pepper
instructions: 1. Fırınınızı 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  Zeytinyağını tavaya alıp piyazlık doğranmış soğanı yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  İnce doğranmış kırmızıbiber, pul biber ve domatesleri ekleyip 10 dakika daha pişirin.
4.  Karışımın aralarında boşluk açarak yumurtaları sarısı bozulmayacak şekilde kırın ve fırında 10 dakika pişirin.
5.  Üzerine kıyılmış maydanoz serpiştirip sarımsaklı yoğurt ile servis yapın.

eggs-with-tomatoes-and-spinach-lezzet.name: Eggs With Tomatoes And Spinach
instructions: 1. Fırını 200 derecede ısıtın.
2.  Ispanakları yıkadıktan sonra bir süzgece koyarak, kaynar suya batırıp yumuşamalarını sağlayın.
3.  Suyunu süzdüğünüz ıspanakları, 4 adet fırın güvecine pay edin.
4.  İri doğradığınız domatesleri ve pul biberi karıştırarak ıspanakların üzerine yayın.
5. Her güvecin ortasında yer açın.
6.  Yumurtaları açtığınız yerlere kırın.
7.  Yaklaşık 12-15 dakika pişirin.
8.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.

eggs-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Eggs With Vegetables
instructions: 1. Patateslerin kabuklarını soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın ve kızgın yağda kızartın.
2.  Fazla yağını çekmesi için kağıt havlu üzerine alın.
3.  Domatesleri yıkayın ve enine ortadan ikiye kesin.
4.  Taze so��anları bir parmak uzunluğunda kesin.
5.  Tereyağını tavada eritin.
6.  Domates ve soğanları birkaç dakika soteleyin.
7.  Patatesleri ekleyin.
8.  Tuz, karabiber ile tatlandırın.
9.  Sebzelerin ortasında boşluk açıp yumurtaları kırın ve kısık ateşte kapağı kapalı olarak birkaç dakika pişirin.
10.  Üzerine tuz, karabiber serpiştirip sıcak servis yapın.

eggs-with-zucchini-and-curd-cheese-lezze.name: Eggs With Zucchini And Curd Cheese
instructions: 1. Kabağı rendeleyip suyunu sıkın.
2.  Tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırıp zeytinyağında 5-6 dakika soteleyin.
3.  Lor peynirini ilave edip ocaktan alın.
4.  Yumurtayı kaynar suda poşe usulü pişirip kağıt havlu üzerine alarak fazla suyunu çektirin.
5.  Sarımsaklı tereyağı için ezdiğiniz sarımsağı tereyağı ile karıştırın ve kızarmış tost ekmeklerinin üzerine sürün.
6.  Kabaklı ve lor peynirli harcı üzerlerine paylaştırın.
7.  Yumurtaları da kabaklı harcın üzerine yerleştirin.
8.  Üzerini ince kıyılmış maydanoz yapraklarıyla süsleyin.
9.  Yanında çeri domates ve küp doğradığınız sarı biberle servis yapın.

eggy-potato-salad-with-pickles.name: Eggy Potato Salad With Pickles

ingredients.item: Sweet pickle juice from jar plus 8–10 sweet-pickle chips
Freshly ground black pepper plus more

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot. Add water to cover by 2", season with salt, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and cook until potatoes are tender when pierced with a knife, 20–30 minutes. Drain. Place potatoes in a large bowl and let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, whisk mayonnaise, pickle juice, Dijon mustard, sugar, 1/4 tsp. pepper, and 1 1/4 tsp. salt in a small bowl for dressing.
Using a large wooden spoon, coarsely smash potatoes, leaving some larger pieces mixed with some well-mashed pieces.

Add dressing and egg yolks to potatoes and toss to coat, coarsely smashing egg yolks. Add onion and parsley; gently mix to incorporate. Season to taste with more salt and pepper, if desired. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Divide potato salad among small paper cups or bowls; dust with paprika. Top each serving with a pickle chip.

egyptian-bissara-split-fava-bean-dip.name: Egyptian Bissara (split Fava Bean Dip)

ingredients.item: Packed fresh cilantro leaves and tender stems (2 ounces; 57g)

ingredients.prep: peeled, root end trimmed, and quartered lengthwise
such as serrano, stemmed, seeded, and chopped (about 1 tablespoon), or 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper, optional

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

instructions: For the Shallot-Infused Oil and Fried Shallots: In an 8-inch skillet, combine oil and shallots over medium-low heat, and cook, stirring often, until shallots are golden brown and crisp, about 20 minutes.
Strain through a fine-mesh strainer into a heatproof bowl. Transfer shallots to a paper-towel lined plate to drain and season with salt. Set shallot-infused oil aside to cool.
Store the fried shallots in an airtight container until you are ready to garnish the bissara. Store the shallot-infused oil in a clean jar.

For the Bissara: Add the rinsed split fava beans to a large bowl; cover with cold water by at least 2 inches. Cover and set aside to soak overnight (at least 12 hours or up to 24 hours) at room temperature. The second day, transfer the beans to a colander and rinse well under cold water; drain.

In a 7-quart Dutch oven or heavy-bottomed pot, combine the fava beans, 1 cup cilantro, parsley, quartered onion, dill, whole garlic cloves, green chili pepper, mint, cumin, coriander, dry mint, paprika, pepper, and salt. Stir in broth and shallot-infused oil (the beans will not be fully submerged in liquid; that’s okay). Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and let the beans simmer gently, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 1 hour. (Your beans may finish cooking in less than an hour; continue simmering to reduce the liquid until to a thick porridge-like consistency.) The beans should be soft and easy to crush with a fork. Make sure to stir every now and then so it doesn’t stick to the bottom of the pan and burn.  Remove from the heat and set aside to cool completely to room temperature, 60 to 90 minutes (mixture will thicken as it cools).

Transfer cooled mixture to a food processor, add the remaining 1 cup fresh cilantro and process until you reach a creamy consistency similar to hummus, about 1 minute, stopping to scrape down the sides as needed. In case the dip is anything less than vibrant green, just add some more fresh parsley or cilantro herbs to punch up the color. Taste the bissara and adjust the seasoning.
Transfer the bissara back to the pot to reheat gently over low heat until just warm or serve at room temperature.

To Serve: Transfer the bissara to a serving bowl and drizzle with shallot-infused oil, garnish with a flutter of paprika, and top with the fried shallots. Serve slightly warm or at room temperature with pita chips and/or vegetable sticks.

egyptian-lahma-bil-basal-beef-in-rich-on.name: Egyptian Lahma Bil Basal (beef In Rich Onion Sauce)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook and stir beef in butter and canola oil in a large saucepan over medium heat until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Add onions, chicken bouillon, bay leaf, salt, and black pepper; pour in water. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until beef is tender and onions have reduced into a thick sauce, at least 2 hours.

einkorn-banana-bread.name: Einkorn Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Stir sugar and melted butter together in a bowl. Mix in eggs, milk, and vanilla until well combined.

Combine sifted flour, cinnamon, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Stir flour mixture into butter mixture until smooth. Fold bananas and walnuts into the batter until fully incorporated. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the loaf reads 91°C (90 degrees C), about 55 minutes.
Remove from the oven and cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Remove loaf from the pan and finish cooling on a wire rack.

einkorn-bulgur-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Einkorn Bulgur Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet kırmızı kapya biber (küçük küpler halinde doğranmış)
1 adet sarı kapya biber (küçük küpler halinde doğranmış)
Yarım su bardağı haşlanmış kırmızı fasulye (konserve veya haşlanmış)
Yarım su bardağı haşlanmış bezelye (taze veya dondurulmuş)
1 adet salatalık veya kabak (küçük küpler halinde doğranmış)
Birkaç dal taze nane (i̇nce kıyılmış, isteğe bağlı)
2-3 dal taze soğan (i̇nce doğranmış, isteğe bağlı)
Haşlanmış kırmızı fasulye (farklı bir renk ve doku için)
Haşlanmış kinoa veya yarma (bulgur ile karıştırılabilir)
Közlenmiş kırmızı biber (daha yoğun, isli bir tat için)
İnce kıyılmış mor lahana (canlı renk ve çıtırlık)
Taze semizotu yaprakları (yaz aylarında ekşi ve sulu doku)
Küçük küpler halinde kornişon turşu (ekşi ve tuzlu lezzet)
Taze soğan yerine kırmızı soğan (i̇nce halkalar halinde)
Ufalanmış beyaz peynir veya keçi peyniri
Küp küp doğranmış izgara hellim peyniri
Halka doğranmış siyah veya yeşil zeytin
Elma sirkesi veya balzamik sirke (limon yerine veya ek olarak)
Nar ekşisi yerine balsamik glaze (daha yoğun kıvamlı)
1 diş ezilmiş sarımsak (daha keskin bir tat için)
Bir tutam kimyon veya zerdeçal (toprak ve sıcak baharat notası)
Pul biber veya i̇sot (acı sevenler için)

instructions: 1. Siyez bulgurunu yıkayın.
2.  Tencereye bulguru, 2 su bardağı suyu ve 1 çay kaşığı tuzu ekleyin.
3.  Kaynamaya başladıktan sonra kısık ateşte, kapağı kapalı olarak suyunu çekene kadar yaklaşık 25-30 dakika pişirin.
4.  Piştikten sonra ocağın altını kapatıp 10 dakika demlendirin ve bir kenarda soğumaya bırakın.
5. Kapya biberleri, salatalığı (veya kabağı), maydanozu, naneyi ve taze soğanı küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
6.  Haşlanmış kırmızı fasulye ve bezelyeyi süzün.
7. Küçük bir kasede zeytinyağı, limon suyu, nar ekşisi, tuz ve karabiberi çırparak salata sosunu hazırlayın.
8. Geniş bir karıştırma kabına soğuyan Siyez bulgurunu, doğradığınız tüm sebzeleri, fasulye ve bezelyeyi ekleyin.
9. Hazırladığınız sosu salatanın üzerine gezdirin.
10. Tüm malzemeler birbiriyle harmanlanana kadar nazikçe karıştırın.
11.  Salatanızı servis tabağına alın.
12.  İsteğe bağlı olarak üzerine biraz daha taze nane veya maydanoz serperek soğuk servis yapın.

einkorn-flour-and-cheese-pastry-lezzet.name: Einkorn Flour And Cheese Pastry

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı zeytinyağı veya ayçiçeği yağı
150 gr beyaz peynir veya ezilmiş lor

instructions: 1. Geniş bir yoğurma kabında ılık süt, toz şeker ve mayayı karıştırın.
2.  5 dakika kadar bekleyerek mayanın aktifleşmesini sağlayın.
3.  Ardından yumurta beyazı, yoğurt, sıvı yağ ve sirkeyi ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Siyez ununu azar azar ekleyerek tuzu da ilave edin.
5.  Ele hafif yapışan, yumuşak ama toparlanabilir kıvamda bir hamur yoğurun.
6.  Hamurun üzerini örtün ve ılık bir ortamda yaklaşık 40 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
7.  İç harç için ezilmiş beyaz peyniri ve ince doğranmış dereotunu karıştırın.
8.  Mayalanan hamurdan mandalina büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın.
9.  Her birini avuç içinde açın, ortasına peynirli harçtan koyun, kapatıp yuvarlayarak şekil verin.
10.  Hazırladığınız poğaçaları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak dizin.
11.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün, isteğe göre susam ve çörek otu serpin.
12.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 20-25 dakika, üzerleri güzelce kızarana kadar pişirin.
13.  Fırından aldıktan sonra ılık ya da oda sıcaklığında servis edin.

einkorn-flour-olive-bread-lezzet.name: Einkorn Flour Olive Bread

ingredients.item: 1 yemek kaşığı doğranmış taze biberiye veya taze kekik

instructions: 1. Ilık suyu bir kaba alın.
2.  Üzerine şekeri ve mayayı ekleyin, karıştırın.
3.  Üzerini örtün ve 5–10 dakika bekleyerek mayanın aktifleşmesini sağlayın.
4.  Geniş bir yoğurma kabına siyez ununu alın.
5.  Tuz, zeytinyağı, doğranmış zeytin ve kekik gibi aromaları ekleyin.
6.  Hazırladığınız maya karışımını dökün.
7.  Tüm malzemeleri karıştırın ve hafif ele yapışan yumuşak bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
8. Hamurun üzerini temiz bir bezle örtün.
9.  Ilık bir ortamda yaklaşık 1 saat, hamur iki katı hacme ulaşana kadar bekletin.
10. Mayalanan hamuru hafif un serpilmiş tezgaha alın.
11.  Kısa bir süre yoğurarak havasını alın.
12.  Hamura yuvarlak ya da baton ekmek şekli verin.
13.  Şekil verdiğiniz hamuru yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
14. Hamurun üzerini tekrar örtün.
15.  15–20 dakika daha oda sıcaklığında dinlendirin.
16. Fırını 200 derece'ye ısıtın.
17.  Dilerseniz ekmeğin üzerine fırça ile biraz zeytinyağı sürün.
18.  Bıçakla yüzeyine birkaç çizik atın.
19. Ekmekleri önceden ısıtılmış fırında 25–30 dakika kadar, üzeri güzelce kızarana dek pişirin.
20. Fırından çıkan ekmeği tel ızgara üzerine alın.
21.  En az 15–20 dakika dinlendirdikten sonra dilimleyerek servis edin.
22.  Afiyet olsun.

einkorn-pancakes.name: Einkorn Pancakes
instructions: Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together into a medium bowl.
Whisk buttermilk, eggs, 1/4 cup melted butter, and vanilla extract together in a bowl; slowly stir in flour mixture until just combined.

Heat a griddle over medium-high heat; grease with butter. Drop 1/4 cup batter onto the griddle; cook until bubbles form around edges and pancake is brown on bottom, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip; cook until brown on other side, 2 to 3 minutes more. Repeat with remaining batter.

einkorn-shortbreads.name: Einkorn Shortbreads

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: heart, clover, or other shape cookie cutter (optional)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 300°. Pulse brown sugar and powdered sugar in a food processor to combine. Add butter and pulse just until combined. Add einkorn flour, all-purpose flour, and salt and pulse until dough comes together. Turn out onto a clean surface; press into about a 6"-diameter disk.

Place dough between 2 sheets of parchment paper and roll out to a ⅓"–½"-thick round. Remove top sheet of parchment and punch out cookies with larger cutter. If using smaller cutter, punch out center of each cookie. Carefully transfer cookies to a large parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing 1" apart. Reroll scraps; punch out more cookies.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheet front to back halfway through if browning unevenly, until golden and firm around edges, 25–35 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.
Do ahead: Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

einstein-lezzet.name: Einstein
instructions: 1. Baharatlar dışında kalan bütün malzemeleri tencereye alın ve yaklaşık 1 saat pişirin .
2. Baharatları ilave ederek karıştırın ve servis edin.
3.  Afiyet olsun.

ekmek-kadaifi-argiro.name: Ekmek Kadaifi

ingredients.item: 160 grάνθος αραβοσίτου βανίλια (που βράζει με γάλα, όχι το στιγμής)
160 grάνθος αραβοσίτου βανίλια (που βράζει με γάλα, όχι το στιγμής)

instructions: Αρχικά, ανοίγουμε το φύλλο κανταΐφι με τα δάχτυλα για να αφρατέψει.
Το περιχύνουμε με το λιωμένο βούτυρο και το απλώνουμε ομοιόμορφα σε ταψί διαστάσεων 24×32×6 εκ.
Ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 170°C με αέρα, για περίπου 30 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει καλά.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει εντελώς πριν συνεχίσουμε.
Βάζουμε σε κατσαρόλα όλα τα υλικά για το σιρόπι και τα βράζουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά για 4 λεπτά.
Προς το τέλος, προσθέτουμε τον χυμό λεμονιού.
Αφήνουμε το σιρόπι να κρυώσει ελαφρώς και αφαιρούμε τη φλούδα και το ξυλάκι κανέλας.
Περιχύνουμε το ψημένο κανταΐφι με το χλιαρό σιρόπι.
